        }
      });
      state.scene.lastUpdatedTurn=round;
    }
  }

  if(!raw){
    addLog(state,'protocol',floorLabel(round)+'未发现关系机器块',{
      turn:round,
      floorL:round,
      detail:'本轮没有检测到 <RELATION> 标签或 relation/json 关系代码块。若正文看起来有关系数据，可能是标签写法不在消息原文中，或被宿主/其他插件清理。',
      code:'REL_BLOCK_MISSING'
    });
    activeList.forEach(function(cid){
      var cs=loadCS(cid);if(!cs)return;
      cs.roundsIdle=(cs.roundsIdle||0)+1;
      var pf=ensurePF(cid);naturalDecay(cs,round);
      var dy=ensureDY(cid);runAutoDyn(cs,dy,round);
      saveDY(cid,dy);saveCS(cid,cs);
    });
    save(state);
    return{parsed:false,results:[],round:round,floorL:round,messageId:trim(opt.messageId||'')};
  }

  var parsed=parseBlock(raw);
  if(!parsed){
    var pinfo=relationParseInfo();
    addLog(state,'protocol',floorLabel(round)+'关系块解析失败',{
      turn:round,
      floorL:round,
      status:'err',
      detail:'已检测到关系块，但内容不是可解析 JSON：'+clip(pinfo.reason||'JSON 格式不合法',140),
      devDetail:'来源='+(blockInfo.source||'unknown')+'；片段='+clip(raw,500),
      code:'REL_PARSE_FAIL'
    });
    save(state);
    return{parsed:false,error:'PARSE_FAIL',results:[],round:round,floorL:round,messageId:trim(opt.messageId||'')};
  }

  var meta=parsed._meta||{};
  if(meta.parseMode&&meta.parseMode!=='strict'){
    addLog(state,'protocol',floorLabel(round)+'关系块兼容解析成功',{
      turn:round,
      floorL:round,
      detail:'来源='+(blockInfo.source||'unknown')+'；已按宽松 JSON 规则修复后解析。',
      code:'REL_PARSE_LOOSE'
    });
  }
  if(meta.missingEvents){
    addLog(state,'protocol',floorLabel(round)+'关系块缺少 events 数组',{
      turn:round,
      floorL:round,
      status:'err',
      detail:'关系块必须包含 events 数组；本轮不会产生关系结算。',
      code:'REL_EVENTS_MISSING'
    });
  }else if(Number(meta.rawEventCount||0)===0){
    addLog(state,'protocol',floorLabel(round)+'AI 判断无关系事件',{turn:round,floorL:round,detail:(parsed.interactions&&parsed.interactions.length)?('events 为空数组；检测到角色间互动 '+parsed.interactions.length+' 条。'):'events 为空数组，本轮不结算关系变化。',code:'REL_EVENTS_EMPTY'});
  }
  if(safeArr(meta.invalidEvents).length){
    addLog(state,'protocol',floorLabel(round)+'关系块含无效事件',{
      turn:round,
      floorL:round,
      status:'err',
      detail:safeArr(meta.invalidEvents).map(function(x){return '#'+(Number(x.index||0)+1)+' '+(x.type||'')+'：'+x.reason}).join('；'),
      code:'REL_EVENT_INVALID'
    });
  }
  if(safeArr(meta.invalidInteractions).length){
    addLog(state,'protocol',floorLabel(round)+'关系块含无效角色互动',{
      turn:round,
      floorL:round,
      status:'err',
      detail:safeArr(meta.invalidInteractions).map(function(x){return '#'+(Number(x.index||0)+1)+' '+(x.type||'')+'：'+x.reason}).join('；'),
      code:'REL_INTERACTION_INVALID'
    });
  }
  addLog(state,'protocol',floorLabel(round)+'机器块解析成功：'+parsed.events.length+' 条有效事件，'+parsed.interactions.length+' 条角色互动',{turn:round,floorL:round,detail:'来源='+(blockInfo.source||'unknown')});
  var results=[];var settledSet={};var crosslinkUsed={};

  parsed.events.forEach(function(ev){
    if(ev.type==='scene_presence')return; /* 已在上面处理 */
    var tgt=resolveTarget(ev.target,state);
    if(!tgt){
      state.pending.push({target:ev.target,type:ev.type,evidence:ev.evidence,reason:'target_unknown',round:round,ts:now()});
      addLog(state,'protocol',floorLabel(round)+'目标无法识别：'+ev.target,{turn:round,floorL:round,detail:'事件目标没有匹配到已追踪角色。',code:'REL_TARGET_UNKNOWN'});
      results.push({event:ev,ok:false,reason:'target_unknown'});
      return;
    }
      var cid=tgt.charId;
      var cs=ensureCS(cid,tgt.charName);
      var pf=ensurePF(cid);

      var sr=settle(ev,cs,pf,round,state);
    if(!sr.ok){
      if(sr.reason==='stage_hold'||sr.reason==='stage_unlikely'){
        state.pending.push({target:ev.target,type:ev.type,evidence:ev.evidence,reason:'stage_hold',round:round,ts:now()});
        addLog(state,'protocol',floorLabel(round)+'阶段挂起待确认：'+ev.type+' @ '+cs.stage,{turn:round,floorL:round,detail:'事件类型与当前关系阶段冲突（证据不足或前提未达成），已挂起待确认。',code:'REL_STAGE_HOLD'});
      }
      results.push({event:ev,charId:cid,charName:tgt.charName,sr:sr,ok:false,reason:sr.reason});
      return;
    }
    var ap=applySettle(cs,sr,round,pf,state,parsed.milestone);
    settledSet[cid]=true;
    var crossChanges=runCrossLinks(cid,ev.type,state,round,crosslinkUsed);
    saveCS(cid,cs);
    var deltaText=ap.leveledUp?'印象升档':(sr.valueImpact?('关系值'+(sr.valueImpact>=0?'+':'')+sr.valueImpact):'仅瞬时情绪');
    addLog(state,'settle',floorLabel(round)+'事件变化：'+tgt.charName+' '+(EVENT_LABEL[sr.type]||sr.type)+' '+deltaText,{charId:cid,charId2:cid,turn:round,floorL:round,detail:ev.evidence,devDetail:'type='+sr.type+',layer='+sr.layer+',dir='+sr.dir+(sr.degraded?',degraded':''),valueFrom:ap.valueFrom,valueTo:ap.valueTo,depthFrom:ap.depthFrom,depthTo:ap.depthTo,evidence:trim(ev.evidence||''),degradeReason:ap.degradeReason||sr.degradeReason||''});
    results.push({event:ev,charId:cid,charName:tgt.charName,sr:sr,ap:ap,crossChanges:crossChanges,ok:true,evidence:trim(ev.evidence||''),valueFrom:ap.valueFrom,valueTo:ap.valueTo,depthFrom:ap.depthFrom,depthTo:ap.depthTo,leveledUp:ap.leveledUp,mood:ap.mood,impressionChange:ap.impressionChange,axisChanges:ap.axisChanges,tagChanges:ap.tagChanges,degradeReason:ap.degradeReason||sr.degradeReason||''});
  });

  if(parsed.interactions&&parsed.interactions.length){
    state.recentInteractions=safeArr(state.recentInteractions);
    var seenPairs={};
    parsed.interactions.forEach(function(ix){
      var from=resolveTarget(ix.from,state);
      var to=resolveTarget(ix.to,state);
      if(!from||!to||from.charId===to.charId){
        state.pending.push({from:ix.from||'',to:ix.to||'',type:ix.type,evidence:ix.evidence,reason:'interaction_target_unknown',round:round,ts:now()});
        addLog(state,'protocol',floorLabel(round)+'角色互动无法识别',{turn:round,floorL:round,detail:'from='+trim(ix.from||'')+'；to='+trim(ix.to||''),code:'REL_INTERACTION_TARGET_UNKNOWN'});
        return;
      }
      var pairKey=from.charId+'>'+to.charId;
      if(seenPairs[pairKey])return;
      seenPairs[pairKey]=true;
      var item={fromCharId:from.charId,fromName:from.charName,toCharId:to.charId,toName:to.charName,type:ix.type,evidence:trim(ix.evidence||''),round:round,ts:now()};
      state.recentInteractions.push(item);
      addLog(state,'protocol',floorLabel(round)+'角色互动记录：'+from.charName+' → '+to.charName+' '+(EVENT_LABEL[ix.type]||ix.type),{turn:round,floorL:round,fromCharId:from.charId,toCharId:to.charId,type:ix.type,detail:ix.evidence,code:'REL_INTERACTION_RECORDED'});
    });
    state.recentInteractions=state.recentInteractions.slice(-50);
  }

  /* ── 动力验证回路：AI 回传 dynamicsResponse，done=true 才生效 ── */
  if(parsed.dynamicsResponse&&parsed.dynamicsResponse.length){
    activeList.forEach(function(cid){
      var cs=loadCS(cid);if(!cs)return;
      var pf=ensurePF(cid);
      var active=pickActiveDynamics(cs,pf,round,state.settings||{});
      active.forEach(function(d){
        var resp=null;
        safeArr(parsed.dynamicsResponse).forEach(function(r){
          if(r&&trim(r.hint)===d.id)resp=r;
        });
        if(resp&&(resp.done===true||resp.done===1||resp.done==='true')){
          confirmDynamic(cs,d,round,trim(resp.note||''));
        }else{
          fallbackDynamic(cs,d,round);
        }
      });
      saveCS(cid,cs);
    });
  }

  /* ── 所有 active 角色：三层衰减 + 待确认衰减 ── */
  activeList.forEach(function(cid){
    var cs=loadCS(cid);if(!cs)return;
    var pf=ensurePF(cid);var dy=ensureDY(cid);
    if(!settledSet[cid])cs.roundsIdle=(cs.roundsIdle||0)+1;
    var settings=state.settings||{};
    decayLayers(cs,round,settings);
    decayPendingConfirm(cs,round,Number(settings.pendingDecayRounds)||3);
    if(parsed.pressureReports&&parsed.pressureReports.length)processPR(parsed.pressureReports,cs,dy);
    saveDY(cid,dy);saveCS(cid,cs);
  });

  if(parsed.unresolved&&parsed.unresolved.length){
    parsed.unresolved.forEach(function(u){
      state.pending.push({target:u.target||'',type:u.type||'',evidence:u.evidence||'',reason:u.reason||'target_unknown',round:round,ts:now()});
    });
  }
  state.pending=state.pending.slice(-50);
  save(state);
  return{parsed:true,results:results,round:round,floorL:round,messageId:trim(opt.messageId||''),evCount:parsed.events.length};
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   prompt context 生成
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

function trackedIds(state){return safeArr(state&&state.roster&&state.roster.activeOrder).filter(Boolean)}

function focusCharIdOf(state,activeList){
  activeList=activeList&&activeList.length?activeList:trackedIds(state);
  if(!activeList.length)return'';
  var ui=state&&state.ui||{};
  var cid=trim(ui.focusCharId||state.roster&&state.roster.focusCharId||'');
  if(cid&&activeList.indexOf(cid)>=0)return cid;
  var present=safeArr(state&&state.scene&&state.scene.present);
  for(var i=0;i<present.length;i++){if(activeList.indexOf(present[i])>=0)return present[i]}
  return activeList[0]||'';
}

function mainCharIdOf(state,focusId,activeList){
  activeList=activeList&&activeList.length?activeList:trackedIds(state);
  var cid=trim(state&&state.roster&&state.roster.mainCharId||'');
  if(cid&&activeList.indexOf(cid)>=0)return cid;
  return focusId||activeList[0]||'';
}

function presentIdsOf(state,activeList,focusId){
  activeList=activeList&&activeList.length?activeList:trackedIds(state);
  var present=safeArr(state&&state.scene&&state.scene.present).filter(function(cid){return activeList.indexOf(cid)>=0});
  if(present.length)return present;
  if(focusId)return[focusId];
  return activeList.slice(0,1);
}

function topTagsForPrompt(cs,maxCount){
  /* v2：旧 impression 语义纠正后，这里取的是态度层 */
  maxCount=maxCount||4;
  var out=[];
  if(cs&&cs.impression){
    Object.keys(cs.impression).forEach(function(tn){
      var imp=cs.impression[tn];
      if(imp&&Number(imp.str||0)>0)out.push({name:tn,strength:Number(imp.str||0),label:STR_LABELS[Number(imp.str||0)]||'轻'});
    });
  }
  out.sort(function(a,b){if(b.strength!==a.strength)return b.strength-a.strength;return a.name>b.name?1:-1});
  return out.slice(0,maxCount);
}

/* v2：瞬时层情绪摘要（供 prompt） */
function moodLineForPrompt(cs){
  var out=[];
  if(cs&&cs.mood){
    Object.keys(cs.mood).forEach(function(tn){
      var md=cs.mood[tn];
      if(md&&Number(md.str||0)>0)out.push({name:tn,strength:Number(md.str||0)});
    });
  }
  out.sort(function(a,b){return b.strength-a.strength});
  return out.slice(0,3);
}

function topAxesForPrompt(cs,maxCount){
  maxCount=maxCount||3;
  var out=[];
  if(cs&&cs.characterAxes){
    Object.keys(cs.characterAxes).forEach(function(tn){
      var axis=cs.characterAxes[tn];
      if(axis&&Number(axis.str||0)>0)out.push({name:tn,strength:Number(axis.str||0),label:AXIS_LABELS[Number(axis.str||0)]||'有点'});
    });
  }
  out.sort(function(a,b){if(b.strength!==a.strength)return b.strength-a.strength;return a.name>b.name?1:-1});
  return out.slice(0,maxCount);
}

function summaryLineJoin(parts){
  parts=safeArr(parts).map(trim).filter(Boolean);
  return parts.join('，');
}

function attitudeSummaryLine(cs){
  var tags=topTagsForPrompt(cs,3);
  if(!tags.length)return'目前还没有明显的态度变化。';
  var names=tags.map(function(t){return t.name});
  if(names.indexOf('好感')>=0&&names.indexOf('防备')>=0)return'她对你有一点好感，但还留着戒心。';
  if(names.indexOf('信任')>=0&&names.indexOf('防备')>=0)return'她愿意信你一点，但没有完全放下防备。';
  if(names.indexOf('好感')>=0&&names.indexOf('信任')>=0)return'她对你有好感，也开始愿意更信你一些。';
  return'她现在主要表现为：'+summaryLineJoin(tags.map(function(t){return t.name+'偏'+(t.label||'轻')}))+'。';
}

function axisSummaryLine(cs){
  var axes=topAxesForPrompt(cs,2);
  if(!axes.length)return'她还没有把你固定成某一种很明确的人。';
  var parts=axes.map(function(x){
    var copy=AXIS_COPY[x.name]||{};
    if(x.strength>=4)return copy.high||('她已经把你当成'+x.name+'的人');
    if(x.strength>=2)return copy.mid||('她越来越觉得你是'+x.name+'的人');
    return copy.low||('她隐约觉得你有点'+x.name);
  });
  return summaryLineJoin(parts);
}

function moodSummaryLine(cs){
  var moods=moodLineForPrompt(cs);
  if(!moods.length)return'她这一刻情绪比较平。';
  var top=moods[0];
  var md=cs&&cs.mood&&cs.mood[top.name]||{};
  var decay=Number(md.decayIn||0)||0;
  return '她这一刻带着'+top.name+'，这股情绪大概还会持续 '+Math.max(1,decay)+' 轮。';
}

/* v2：阶段内成熟度定位（早/中/晚） */
function stageMaturityOf(cs){
  var d=clamp(Number(cs.depth||0)||0,0,100);
  var stage=cs.stage||depthToStage(d);
  var range=STAGE_RANGES.filter(function(r){return r.name===stage})[0]||{lo:0,hi:19};
  var span=Math.max(1,range.hi-range.lo);
  var rel=(d-range.lo)/span;          /* 0~1 */
  if(rel<0.34)return 'early';
  if(rel<0.67)return 'mid';
  return 'late';
}
var MATURITY_LABEL={early:'早段',mid:'中段',late:'晚段'};
var MATURITY_HINT={
  '陌路':{
    early:'对方还没有关注到这个人。有实质互动时可以产生第一笔印象。',
    mid:'有了几次接触，初步印象开始成形，但很不稳定。',
    late:'基础态度有了雏形，对方开始记得这个人。'
  },
  '初识':{
    early:'基础态度刚成形，互动以试探和信息交换为主。',
    mid:'态度可预期，好感/信任/警惕可以明确涨落。',
    late:'某一方向态度经过多次强化，接近质变。'
  },
  '往来':{
    early:'关系模式初步稳定，以日常波动为主。',
    mid:'关系复杂性开始显现——依赖、嫉妒、忠诚试探有了发生的土壤。',
    late:'某一关系维度积蓄到接近质变，等待突破性事件。'
  },
  '纠葛':{
    early:'深度卷入刚开始，张力与复杂性全面铺开。',
    mid:'关系经受各种考验，在震荡中检验韧性。',
    late:'关系若在反复考验中保持稳定或对立保持深刻，便接近不可逆。'
  },
  '羁绊':{
    early:'高度绑定已确立，在日常中持续深化或持续对峙。',
    mid:'关系接近身份认同层面——对方是否成为自我定义的一部分。',
    late:'只差一次根本性的性质转变，便可进入终态。'
  },
  '宿命':{
    early:'关系已固化为终态，绝大多数轮次应输出空事件。',
    mid:'关系在日常中持续深化，体现为细节丰富而非数值攀升。',
    late:'关系已是身份认同的一部分，任何变化都需要充分持续的证据。'
  }
};

/* v2：里程碑判据（仅某标签 4档 pendingConfirm 时注入） */
var MILESTONE_CRITERIA={
  '好感':'【好感里程碑判据】只有当这段关系的性质发生改变时才算，而不是单纯更开心一点、更亲近一点。',
  '信任':'【信任里程碑判据】只有当信任从愿意相信，变成愿意把重要风险真正交给对方时才算。',
  '忠诚':'【忠诚里程碑判据】只有当忠诚从口头站队，变成即使付出代价也不动摇时才算。',
  '尊重':'【尊重里程碑判据】只有当认可上升为真正把对方当成标杆、平等者或高位参考时才算。',
  '归属':'【归属里程碑判据】只有当这段关系进入“失去会动摇自我”的层级时才算。'
};

function breakthroughHintsFor(cs){
  /* v2：仅某标签 4档 pendingConfirm 时注入该标签的里程碑判据。
     优先读世界书 rel_milestone_*，缺失回退硬编码 MILESTONE_CRITERIA。 */
  var hints=[];
  if(!cs||!cs.impression)return hints;
  Object.keys(cs.impression).forEach(function(tag){
    var imp=cs.impression[tag];
    if(imp.str===4&&imp.state==='pendingConfirm'){
      var wb=readWBContent('rel_milestone_'+tag);
      var cri=trim(wb)||(MILESTONE_CRITERIA&&MILESTONE_CRITERIA[tag]||'');
      if(cri)hints.push({tag:tag,criteria:cri});
    }
  });
  return hints;
}

function promptDynamicsForChar(cs,pf,dy,round,state){
  /* v2：返回本轮该提示给 AI 的动力（带 hint id，供回传）。节流：同轮最多 1 重 + 1 轻 */
  var settings=(state&&state.settings)||{};
  var active=pickActiveDynamics(cs,pf,round,settings);
  var heavy=null,lights=[];
  active.forEach(function(d){
    if(d.weight==='heavy'){if(!heavy)heavy=d}
    else if(d.weight==='light'){if(lights.length<1)lights.push(d)}
    else{if(!heavy)heavy=d;else if(lights.length<1)lights.push(d)}
  });
  var out=[];
  if(heavy)out.push({id:heavy.id,label:heavy.label,hint:heavy.id,libKey:heavy.libKey,weight:heavy.weight,prompt:lookupDynPrompt(heavy.libKey,pf)});
  lights.forEach(function(d){out.push({id:d.id,label:d.label,hint:d.id,libKey:d.libKey,weight:d.weight,prompt:lookupDynPrompt(d.libKey,pf)})});
  return out;
}

function buildCharacterPromptState(state,cid,focusId,mainId,presentIds,round){
  var cs=loadCS(cid);if(!cs)return null;
  var pf=ensurePF(cid);var dy=ensureDY(cid);
  var inScene=presentIds.indexOf(cid)>=0;
  var mat=stageMaturityOf(cs);
  return{
    id:cid,
    name:cs.charName||cid,
    roleType:trim(state&&state.roster&&state.roster.characters&&state.roster.characters[cid]&&state.roster.characters[cid].role||'secondary')||'secondary',
    inScene:inScene,
    isFocus:cid===focusId,
    isMain:cid===mainId,
    value:Number(cs.value||0)||0,
    depth:Number(cs.depth||0)||0,
    stage:cs.stage||depthToStage(Number(cs.depth||0)||0),
    stageMaturity:mat,
    maturityLabel:MATURITY_LABEL[mat]||'',
    maturityHint:MATURITY_HINT[cs.stage||depthToStage(Number(cs.depth||0)||0)]?MATURITY_HINT[cs.stage||depthToStage(Number(cs.depth||0)||0)][mat]||'':'',
    tendency:valueTendency(Number(cs.value||0)||0),
    topTags:topTagsForPrompt(cs,4),
    topAttitudes:topTagsForPrompt(cs,4),
    topAxes:topAxesForPrompt(cs,3),
    topMood:moodLineForPrompt(cs),
    impression:cs.impression||{},
    characterAxes:cs.characterAxes||{},
    mood:cs.mood||{},
    attitudeSummary:attitudeSummaryLine(cs),
    axisSummary:axisSummaryLine(cs),
    moodSummary:moodSummaryLine(cs),
    profileSummary:trim(pf.summary||''),
    activeDynamics:promptDynamicsForChar(cs,pf,dy,round,state),
    breakthroughHints:breakthroughHintsFor(cs)
  };
}
function relationTargetListForPrompt(state){
  state=state||load();
  var active=safeArr(state.roster&&state.roster.activeOrder).map(trim).filter(Boolean).slice(0,5);
  var chars=state.roster&&state.roster.characters||{};

  return active.map(function(cid){
    var rc=chars[cid]||{};
    var cs=loadCS(cid)||{};
    var aliases=[]
      .concat(safeArr(rc.aliases))
      .concat(safeArr(cs.aliases))
      .map(trim)
      .filter(Boolean);

    var seen={};
    aliases=aliases.filter(function(a){
      var k=sig(a);
      if(!k||seen[k])return false;
      seen[k]=1;
      return true;
    }).slice(0,6);

    return{
      id:cid,
      name:cs.charName||rc.name||rc.displayName||cid,
      displayName:rc.displayName||rc.name||cs.charName||cid,
      aliases:aliases,
      role:rc.role||'secondary'
    };
  });
}

function buildRelCtxObject(state){
  state=state||load();

  var activeList=trackedIds(state).slice(0,5);
  var round=Number(state&&state.meta&&state.meta.round||0)||0;
  var focusId=focusCharIdOf(state,activeList);
  var mainId=mainCharIdOf(state,focusId,activeList);
  var presentIds=presentIdsOf(state,activeList,focusId);

  var characters=activeList
    .map(function(cid){
      return buildCharacterPromptState(state,cid,focusId,mainId,presentIds,round);
    })
    .filter(Boolean);

  var focus=null;
  var main=null;

  characters.forEach(function(ch){
    if(ch.isFocus)focus=ch;
    if(ch.isMain)main=ch;
  });

  var allowedTargets=relationTargetListForPrompt(state);

  var custom=trim(readCustomRules()||'');
  if(/^（在这里/.test(custom))custom='';

  return{
    targetPolicy:{
      maxTracked:5,
      mode:allowedTargets.length===0?'none':(allowedTargets.length===1?'single':'strict'),
      allowed:allowedTargets,
      instruction:allowedTargets.length
        ? '关系事件 target 必须从 allowed 名单中选择；不在名单内的角色不能产生关系变化。单角色时 target 固定写唯一绑定角色。'
        : '当前没有绑定可结算角色，events 必须为空。'
    },
    focus:focus,
    main:main,
    characters:characters,
    present:characters.filter(function(ch){
      return ch.inScene;
    }),
    offstage:characters.filter(function(ch){
      return !ch.inScene;
    }),
    scene:{
      present:presentIds,
      lastUpdatedTurn:Number(state&&state.scene&&state.scene.lastUpdatedTurn||0)||0
    },
    pending:safeArr(state&&state.pending).slice(-10),
    recentInteractions:safeArr(state&&state.recentInteractions).slice(-8),
    customRules:custom,
    flags:{
      enabled:!!(state&&state.settings&&state.settings.enabled!==false),
      autoSettle:!!(state&&state.settings&&state.settings.autoSettle!==false),
      cleanMachineBlock:!!(state&&state.settings&&state.settings.cleanMachineBlock!==false),
      maxTracked:Number(state&&state.settings&&state.settings.maxTracked||0)||0,
      injectRulesFallback:!!(state&&state.settings&&state.settings.injectRulesFallback),
      fullStageGuide:false
    },
    activeDynamics:focus&&focus.activeDynamics?focus.activeDynamics:[],
    breakthroughHints:focus&&focus.breakthroughHints?focus.breakthroughHints:[],
    stageGuide:focus?(trim(readStageGuide(focus.stage)||buildStageContent(focus.stage)||'')):'',
    stageGuideBrief:focus?buildStageBriefContent(focus.stage,focus.stageMaturity):'',
    timestamp:{
      ts:now(),
      round:round
    }
  };
}


function buildRelLibObject(state){
  state=state||load();
  var stageGuides={};
  STAGES.forEach(function(stg){
    stageGuides[stg]=trim(readStageGuide(stg)||buildStageContent(stg)||'');
  });
  var custom=trim(readCustomRules()||'');
  if(/^（在这里/.test(custom))custom='';
  return{
    stageGuides:stageGuides,
    sceneHints:{
      focus:'焦点角色优先完整呈现。',
      present:'在场角色参与动态提示，不在场次要角色不注入。',
      offstage:'主要角色不在场时只保留一行摘要提示。'
    },
    systemRulesText:trim(readWBContent('rel_rules')||buildRulesContent()||''),
    generalGuideline:trim(readWBContent('rel_general_guideline')||buildGeneralGuideline()||''),
    eventTypesText:trim(readWBContent('rel_event_types')||buildEventTypeList()||''),
    milestoneCriteria:readMilestoneCriteriaAll(),
    customRulesText:custom,
    strengthLabels:{0:'无',1:'微弱',2:'轻',3:'明显',4:'强烈',5:'极端'}
  };
}

/* v2：读取所有里程碑判据（优先世界书 rel_milestone_*，缺失回退硬编码） */
function readMilestoneCriteriaAll(){
  var out={};
  ['好感','信任','忠诚','尊重','归属'].forEach(function(tag){
    var wb=readWBContent('rel_milestone_'+tag);
    out[tag]=trim(wb)||(MILESTONE_CRITERIA&&MILESTONE_CRITERIA[tag]||'');
  });
  return out;
}

function buildGeneralGuideline(){
  return[
    '【关系演绎总则】',
    '1. 通用性：这段关系可能是恋爱、忠诚、权力、依赖、秘密、冲突、竞争等任何类型。不要预设它一定是恋爱。用中性词理解"关系"，根据角色自身的人设和画像来演绎。',
    '2. 事件类型是中性标签：事件清单中每个类型描述的是"关系的客观变化"，不是"应该演什么情节"。同一个 affection_grow，在恋爱场景是心动，在战友场景是信赖，在师徒场景是敬佩。',
    '3. 阶段指引是软边界：系统注入的阶段指引描述的是"这个阶段通常不会发生什么"。如果确实发生了，系统会通过降级或挂起来处理，AI 只需如实报告。',
    '4. "突破"比"维持"重要：不要为推进关系而每轮都报正向事件。日常互动若没真正突破对方当前的印象水平，应输出空事件。一个有证据的空事件好过一个没根据的正向事件。',
    '5. 瞬时情绪 ≠ 长期关系：对方本轮开心或生气是瞬时情绪，系统会单独处理。长期关系变化需要更实质的互动，不要把"今天心情好"报成"好感增长"。',
    '6. 多角色场景：如果在场有多个角色，注意区分谁和谁之间发生了什么。用户与角色的互动走 events，角色与角色之间的互动走 interactions。不要混淆。',
    '7. 不泄露后台：正文不得出现"关系值""标签""阶段""数值""好感度""印象层""深度"等系统术语。'
  ].join('\n');
}
function buildStageBriefContent(stg,maturity){
  var m={
    '陌路':'有实质互动时可报告轻微印象变化；纯寒暄保持空事件。',
    '初识':'好感/信任/警惕的明确涨落可以报告；不要把礼貌互动持续报成关系推进。',
    '往来':'只在真正突破当前印象水平时报告；大部分日常互动应为空事件。',
    '纠葛':'事件分量重，宁少勿滥；里程碑只在性质改变时成立。',
    '羁绊':'低密度高门槛；只报告实质性转折，不报程度累积。',
    '宿命':'极低密度；除非出现足以动摇身份认同的变化，否则维持空事件。'
  };
  var base=trim(m[stg]||'只报告真正突破当前关系边界的变化。');
  var level=maturity&&MATURITY_LABEL[maturity]?('当前成熟度：'+MATURITY_LABEL[maturity]+'。 '):'';
  return level+base;
}

function buildCtxTextFallback(state,relCtx,relLib){
  relCtx=relCtx||buildRelCtxObject(state);
  relLib=relLib||buildRelLibObject(state);
  var focus=relCtx&&relCtx.focus;
  if(!focus)return'';
  var lines=['【关系系统】'];
  var tp=relCtx&&relCtx.targetPolicy||{};
  var allowed=safeArr(tp.allowed);

  if(allowed.length){
    lines.push('【关系结算目标锁定】');
    lines.push('只有以下已绑定角色可以产生关系变化：');
    allowed.forEach(function(t,i){
      var aliasText=safeArr(t.aliases).length?'（别名：'+safeArr(t.aliases).join('、')+'）':'';
      lines.push((i+1)+'. '+t.name+'，target 必须写：'+t.name+aliasText);
    });
    lines.push('如果事件影响的是玩家对当前角色的态度变化，target 仍然写被影响的已绑定角色名，不写玩家名。');
    lines.push('不在名单里的角色不要输出关系变化事件。');
  }else{
    lines.push('【关系结算目标锁定】当前没有绑定可结算角色，本轮 events 必须为空。');
  }

  if(focus.inScene!==false){
    lines.push('焦点角色：'+focus.name+'（ID：'+focus.id+'）');
    lines.push('阶段：'+focus.stage+' · '+focus.tendency+'（'+(focus.maturityLabel||'')+'）');
    if(focus.maturityHint)lines.push('阶段定位：'+focus.maturityHint);
    var briefGuide=trim(relCtx&&relCtx.stageGuideBrief||'');
    if(briefGuide)lines.push('阶段摘要：'+briefGuide);
    var fGuide=trim(relCtx&&relCtx.stageGuide||'');
    if(fGuide&&relCtx&&relCtx.flags&&relCtx.flags.fullStageGuide)lines.push('阶段指引：\n'+fGuide);
    if(trim(focus.attitudeSummary||''))lines.push('她现在对你的态度：'+focus.attitudeSummary);
    if(trim(focus.axisSummary||''))lines.push('她眼中的你：'+focus.axisSummary);
    if(trim(focus.moodSummary||''))lines.push('她这一刻的状态：'+focus.moodSummary);
    if(focus.profileSummary)lines.push('角色画像：'+focus.profileSummary);
    if(focus.activeDynamics&&focus.activeDynamics.length){
      focus.activeDynamics.forEach(function(d){
        lines.push('【行为倾向·'+d.weight+'】'+d.prompt+'（如本轮照做，请在 dynamicsResponse 回传 hint:"'+d.id+'", done:true）');
      });
    }
    if(focus.breakthroughHints&&focus.breakthroughHints.length){
      focus.breakthroughHints.forEach(function(b){
        lines.push(b.criteria);
      });
    }
  }else{
    lines.push('焦点角色：'+focus.name+'（当前不在场）');
  }
  var mainOffstage=relCtx.offstage.filter(function(ch){return ch.isMain&&!ch.isFocus})[0]||null;
  if(mainOffstage)lines.push('\n主要角色：'+mainOffstage.name+'（当前不在场）');
  relCtx.present.filter(function(ch){return !ch.isFocus}).forEach(function(ch){
    if(ch.isMain){
      lines.push('\n在场主要角色：'+ch.name+'（'+ch.stage+' · '+ch.tendency+'）');
      if(ch.profileSummary)lines.push('摘要：'+ch.profileSummary);
      else if(ch.topTags&&ch.topTags.length)lines.push('当前印象：'+ch.topTags.map(function(t){return t.name+'·'+(t.label||STR_LABELS[t.strength]||'轻')}).join('，'));
      return;
    }
    lines.push('\n在场角色：'+ch.name+'（'+ch.stage+' · '+ch.tendency+'）');
    if(ch.topTags&&ch.topTags.length)lines.push('印象提示：'+ch.topTags.map(function(t){return t.name+'·'+(t.label||STR_LABELS[t.strength]||'轻')}).join('，'));
  });
  if(relCtx.pending&&relCtx.pending.length)lines.push('\n当前待确认：'+relCtx.pending.length+' 条');
  if(relCtx.recentInteractions&&relCtx.recentInteractions.length){
    lines.push('\n近期角色互动：'+relCtx.recentInteractions.slice(-3).map(function(ix){
      return (ix.fromName||ix.fromCharId||'角色')+'→'+(ix.toName||ix.toCharId||'角色')+'：'+(EVENT_LABEL[ix.type]||ix.type);
    }).join('；'));
  }
  if(relCtx.customRules)lines.push('\n【玩家自定义规则】\n'+relCtx.customRules);
  return lines.join('\n');
}

function clearPromptVars(){
  rawSet('rel_ctx','{}','chat');
  rawSet('rel_lib','{}','chat');
  rawSet('rel_prompt_context','','chat');
  return{rel_ctx:{},rel_lib:{},rel_prompt_context:''};
}

function syncPromptVars(state){
  state=state||load();
  if(!masterRelationEnabled())return clearPromptVars();
  var relCtx=buildRelCtxObject(state);
  var relLib=buildRelLibObject(state);
  try{
    var chatId=trim(state&&state.chatId||currentChatId()||'default');
    var allowed=safeArr(relCtx&&relCtx.targetPolicy&&relCtx.targetPolicy.allowed).map(function(x){return trim(x&&x.id||x&&x.name||'')}).join('|');
    var focus=relCtx&&relCtx.focus||{};
    var guideKey=[chatId,trim(focus.id||''),trim(focus.stage||''),trim(focus.stageMaturity||''),allowed,hashSmall(trim(relCtx&&relCtx.customRules||''))].join('::');
    app._promptGuideKeys=app._promptGuideKeys&&typeof app._promptGuideKeys==='object'?app._promptGuideKeys:{};
    relCtx.flags=relCtx.flags&&typeof relCtx.flags==='object'?relCtx.flags:{};
    relCtx.flags.fullStageGuide=app._promptGuideKeys[chatId]!==guideKey;
    app._promptGuideKeys[chatId]=guideKey;
  }catch(_guide){}
  var fallback=buildCtxTextFallback(state,relCtx,relLib);
  var relCtxText=JSON.stringify(relCtx||{});
  var relLibText=JSON.stringify(relLib||{});
  rawSet('rel_ctx',relCtxText,'chat');
  rawSet('rel_lib',relLibText,'chat');
  rawSet('rel_prompt_context',fallback,'chat');
  return{rel_ctx:relCtx,rel_lib:relLib,rel_prompt_context:fallback};
}

function buildCtx(state){
  return buildCtxTextFallback(state);
}

function tagStrengthLabel(str){
  if(str>=5)return'极端';if(str>=4)return'强烈';if(str>=3)return'明显';if(str>=2)return'轻';if(str>=1)return'微弱';return'无';
}

function dynHint(did,expr){
  var H={
    trust_release:{'外显':'（角色可能会用行动展现信任——分享秘密、主动依赖、给予信物。）','普通':'（角色可能在某个时机自然地展现信任。）','内敛':'（角色可能用不起眼的小细节暗示信任——默默帮忙、不经意的放松。）'},
    jealousy_surface:{'外显':'（角色可能会直接表达不满或醋意。）','普通':'（角色可能会隐约流露嫉妒的情绪。）','内敛':'（角色可能只是沉默或眼神微变，但嫉妒在心里翻涌。）'},
    guilt_attempt:{'外显':'（角色可能会直接道歉或试图弥补。）','普通':'（角色可能在某个时刻流露出愧疚。）','内敛':'（角色可能不会说什么，但行为里带着补偿的痕迹。）'},
    distance_signal:{'外显':'（角色可能会直接拉开距离、回避互动。）','普通':'（角色可能在对话中显得有些疏离。）','内敛':'（角色可能只是回应变得简短，语气微妙地冷了一度。）'},
    dependency_show:{'外显':'（角色可能会主动寻求陪伴或帮助。）','普通':'（角色可能无意中表现出对玩家的依赖。）','内敛':'（角色可能表面独立，但眼神或停顿里藏着不想分开的意思。）'},
    compete_edge:{'外显':'（角色可能直接发起挑战或比较。）','普通':'（角色可能在某些事上表现出竞争意识。）','内敛':'（角色可能不说什么，但暗暗在意胜负。）'}
  };
  var h=H[did];if(!h)return'';
  return h[expr]||h['普通']||'';
}
function boundLorebookIdMap(){
  try{return app._boundLorebookIdMap||null}catch(_){return null}
}

function textMentionsCharacter(text,charName,aliases){
  var base=sig(text||'');
  if(!base)return false;
  var keys=[charName].concat(safeArr(aliases)).map(function(x){return sig(x)}).filter(Boolean);
  for(var i=0;i<keys.length;i++){
    if(keys[i]&&base.indexOf(keys[i])>=0)return true;
  }
  return false;
}

async function collectProfileSourcesForCharacter(charId,charName,aliases,sourceConfig){
  var out=[],seen={};
  var sc=sourceConfig&&typeof sourceConfig==='object'?sourceConfig:{};
  var useCard=sc.useCharacterCard!==false;
  var useWB=sc.useWorldbookEntries!==false;
  var selectedBooks=safeArr(sc.selectedBookIds);
  var selectedEntries=safeArr(sc.selectedEntryKeys);
  var selectedBookMap={};selectedBooks.forEach(function(x){selectedBookMap[String(x)]=true});
  var selectedEntryMap={};selectedEntries.forEach(function(x){selectedEntryMap[String(x)]=true});
  var hasBookFilter=selectedBooks.length>0;
  var hasEntryFilter=selectedEntries.length>0;
  var hasAnySelection=hasBookFilter||hasEntryFilter;
  var boundMap=boundLorebookIdMap();

  function pushBlock(title,text){
    text=trim(text||'');
    if(!text)return;
    var key=hashSmall(title+'|'+sig(text));
    if(seen[key])return;
    seen[key]=true;
    out.push('【'+title+'】\n'+text);
  }

  try{
    if(useCard&&charId&&TV&&TV.character&&TV.character.get){
      var ch=await hostCall(function(){return TV.character.get(Number(charId))},'character.get.profile-source',12000,{silent:true,fallback:null});
      if(ch){
        pushBlock('角色卡描述',ch.description||'');
        pushBlock('角色卡人格',ch.personality||'');
        pushBlock('角色卡设定',ch.scenario||'');
        pushBlock('角色卡备注',ch.creator_notes||'');
        pushBlock('角色卡系统提示',ch.system_prompt||'');
      }
    }
  }catch(_){}

  try{
    if(useWB&&TV&&TV.lorebook&&TV.lorebook.all){
      var books=await hostCall(function(){return TV.lorebook.all()},'lorebook.all.profile-source',12000,{silent:true,fallback:[]});
      books=safeArr(books);
      for(var i=0;i<books.length;i++){
        var b=books[i];
        if(!b||b.id==null)continue;
        if(boundMap&&!boundMap[String(b.id)])continue;
        var full=b;
        try{
          if(!safeArr(full.entries).length&&TV.lorebook.get){
            full=await hostCall(function(){return TV.lorebook.get(b.id)},'lorebook.get.profile-source.'+b.id,12000,{silent:true,fallback:b});
          }
        }catch(_2){}
        safeArr(full&&full.entries).forEach(function(e){
          var ename=trim(e&&e.name||e&&e.identifier||'');
          var content=trim(e&&e.content||'');
          if(!content)return;
          var ekey=String(b.id)+'::'+ename;
          if(hasAnySelection&&!selectedBookMap[String(b.id)]&&!selectedEntryMap[ekey])return;
          pushBlock('世界书条目 '+ename,content);
        });
      }
    }
  }catch(_3){}

  return out.slice(0,12);
}

async function listProfileSources(charId){
  var cs=loadCS(charId);if(!cs)return{charCard:[],worldBook:[]};
  var charCard=[],worldBook=[];
  var boundMap=boundLorebookIdMap();
  try{
    if(charId&&TV&&TV.character&&TV.character.get){
      var ch=await hostCall(function(){return TV.character.get(Number(charId))},'character.get.list-sources',12000,{silent:true,fallback:null});
      if(ch){
        var fields=[['description','角色描述'],['personality','角色人格'],['scenario','角色设定'],['creator_notes','创建者备注'],['system_prompt','系统提示']];
        for(var fi=0;fi<fields.length;fi++){
          var f=fields[fi],txt=trim(ch[f[0]]||'');
          if(txt)charCard.push({field:f[0],label:f[1],preview:clip(txt,80),content:txt});
        }
      }
    }
  }catch(_){}
  try{
    if(TV&&TV.lorebook&&TV.lorebook.all){
      var books=await hostCall(function(){return TV.lorebook.all()},'lorebook.all.list-sources',12000,{silent:true,fallback:[]});
      books=safeArr(books);
      for(var i=0;i<books.length;i++){
        var b=books[i];if(!b||b.id==null)continue;
        if(boundMap&&!boundMap[String(b.id)])continue;
        var full=b;
        try{if(!safeArr(full.entries).length&&TV.lorebook.get){full=await hostCall(function(){return TV.lorebook.get(b.id)},'lorebook.get.list-sources.'+b.id,12000,{silent:true,fallback:b})}}catch(_2){}
        safeArr(full&&full.entries).forEach(function(e){
          var ename=trim(e&&e.name||e&&e.identifier||'');
          var content=trim(e&&e.content||'');
          if(!content)return;
          worldBook.push({bookId:b.id,bookName:trim(b.name||'世界书'),entryName:ename,preview:clip(content,80),content:content});
        });
      }
    }
  }catch(_3){}
  return{charCard:charCard,worldBook:worldBook};
}

function buildProfileDimensionPrompt(cs,sources){
  return [
    '你是角色画像维度分析器。',
    '请只根据提供的人设资料，输出一个 JSON 对象，不要解释，不要代码块。',
    '只允许以下字段：',
    'trustTendency, emotionSensitivity, conflictResilience, repairAcceptance, attachmentMode, expressionStyle',
    '',
    '各字段可选值必须严格从下面选择：',
    'trustTendency: 容易信任 / 普通 / 难以信任',
    'emotionSensitivity: 敏感 / 普通 / 迟钝',
    'conflictResilience: 坚韧 / 普通 / 脆弱',
    'repairAcceptance: 容易修复 / 普通 / 记仇',
    'attachmentMode: 容易依附 / 普通 / 独立',
    'expressionStyle: 外显 / 普通 / 内敛',
    '',
    '如果资料不足，就填“普通”。',
    '',
    '输出格式示例：',
    '{"trustTendency":"普通","emotionSensitivity":"敏感","conflictResilience":"坚韧","repairAcceptance":"普通","attachmentMode":"独立","expressionStyle":"内敛"}',
    '',
    '角色名：'+(cs&&cs.charName||'未命名角色'),
    '',
    '人设资料：',
    sources.join('\n\n')
  ].join('\n');
}

function parseProfileDimensionResult(text,pfOld){
  pfOld=pfOld||defProfile();
  var out=defProfile();
  PROFILE_DIMS.forEach(function(dim){
    out[dim]=pfOld[dim]||'普通';
  });

  text=trim(String(text||''));
  if(!text)return out;

  if(/^```/.test(text)){
    text=text.replace(/^```[a-zA-Z0-9_-]*\s*/,'').replace(/\s*```$/,'');
  }

  var start=text.indexOf('{');
  var end=text.lastIndexOf('}');
  if(start>=0&&end>start)text=text.slice(start,end+1);

  try{
    var obj=JSON.parse(text);
    PROFILE_DIMS.forEach(function(dim){
      var val=trim(obj&&obj[dim]||'');
      if(val&&PROFILE_RULES[dim]&&PROFILE_RULES[dim][val])out[dim]=val;
    });
  }catch(_){}

  return out;
}

function profileSummaryFromDims(pf){
  pf=pf||defProfile();
  var parts=[];
  if(pf.trustTendency==='难以信任')parts.push('防备心重');
  else if(pf.trustTendency==='容易信任')parts.push('更容易交付信任');

  if(pf.emotionSensitivity==='敏感')parts.push('情绪感受细');
  else if(pf.emotionSensitivity==='迟钝')parts.push('情绪反应偏慢');

  if(pf.conflictResilience==='坚韧')parts.push('遇到冲突不容易退');
  else if(pf.conflictResilience==='脆弱')parts.push('冲突里更容易受伤');

  if(pf.repairAcceptance==='记仇')parts.push('修复关系需要更长时间');
  else if(pf.repairAcceptance==='容易修复')parts.push('关系缓和相对更快');

  if(pf.attachmentMode==='容易依附')parts.push('更容易形成依附');
  else if(pf.attachmentMode==='独立')parts.push('会本能保留独立空间');

  if(pf.expressionStyle==='内敛')parts.push('表达偏克制');
  else if(pf.expressionStyle==='外显')parts.push('情绪和态度更愿意外露');

  if(!parts.length)return'画像资料不足，按通用规则判断。';
  return parts.join('，')+'。';
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   画像 API 生成
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

async function genProfileDimensions(cs,pf,sources){
  sources=safeArr(sources).map(trim).filter(Boolean);
  if(!sources.length)throw new Error('没有可用于画像生成的人设来源');

  var prompt=buildProfileDimensionPrompt(cs,sources);

  var txt='';
  var lastErr=null;
  /* v2：AI 偶尔返回空内容，自动重试 2 次，避免一次性"没有返回可用内容" */
  if(TV&&typeof TV.generate==='function'){
    for(var attempt=0;attempt<3;attempt++){
      try{
        txt=await hostCall(function(){
          return TV.generate(prompt,{
            settings:{
              temperature:0.2+attempt*0.15,
              maxCompletionTokens:320
            }
          });
        },'generate.profile-dimensions',60000);
        txt=trim(txt||'');
        if(txt)break;   /* 拿到非空就停 */
      }catch(e){lastErr=e}
    }
  }else{
    throw new Error('当前宿主不支持画像生成');
  }

  txt=trim(txt||'');
  if(!txt){
    if(lastErr)throw new Error('画像生成失败（模型未返回内容，已重试3次）：'+String(lastErr&&lastErr.message||lastErr));
    throw new Error('模型连续3次未返回内容，请稍后重试或换一个模型');
  }

  var parsed=parseProfileDimensionResult(txt,pf);

  return parsed;
}


async function genProfileSummary(cs,pf){
  return profileSummaryFromDims(pf||defProfile());
}

async function updateProfileSync(charId,sourceConfig){
  var cs=loadCS(charId);if(!cs)return false;
  var pf=ensurePF(charId);
  var aliases=safeArr(cs.aliases).map(trim).filter(Boolean).slice(0,10);
  var sc=sourceConfig&&typeof sourceConfig==='object'?sourceConfig:null;
  var sources=await collectProfileSourcesForCharacter(charId,cs.charName,aliases,sc);
  if(sc)pf.sourceConfig=sc;

  if(!sources.length){
    addCLog(cs,'api','画像生成失败：没有找到可用的人设来源');
    saveCS(charId,cs);
    return false;
  }

  var dims=await genProfileDimensions(cs,pf,sources);

  PROFILE_DIMS.forEach(function(dim){
    if(dims[dim]&&PROFILE_RULES[dim]&&PROFILE_RULES[dim][dims[dim]])pf[dim]=dims[dim];
  });

  pf.summary=profileSummaryFromDims(pf);
  pf.generatedAt=now();
  pf.source='api';
  savePF(charId,pf);

  try{
    await syncProfileWB(charId,cs.charName,pf.summary||'');
  }catch(e){
    addCLog(cs,'system','画像世界书同步失败: '+String(e&&e.message||e));
  }

  addCLog(cs,'api','角色画像维度已更新');
  saveCS(charId,cs);

  try{syncPromptVars(load())}catch(_){}
  return true;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   角色管理
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

function initChar(state,charId,charName,opts){
  opts=opts||{};
  var chars=state.roster&&state.roster.characters||{};
  if(chars[charId])return{ok:false,reason:'角色已追踪'};
  if(Object.keys(chars).length>=(state.settings.maxTracked||10))
    return{ok:false,reason:'已达追踪上限'};

  state.roster.characters[charId]={id:charId,name:charName,displayName:charName,aliases:[],role:opts.role||'secondary',status:'active'};
  if(state.roster.activeOrder.indexOf(charId)<0)state.roster.activeOrder.push(charId);
  if(opts.role==='main'&&!trim(state.roster.mainCharId||''))state.roster.mainCharId=charId;
  if(opts.role==='main'&&!trim(state.roster.focusCharId||''))state.roster.focusCharId=charId;
  state.scene=state.scene&&typeof state.scene==='object'?state.scene:{present:[],lastUpdatedTurn:0};
  if(opts.present===true&&state.scene.present.indexOf(charId)<0)state.scene.present.push(charId);
  rebuildAliasIndex(state);
  var cs=defCharState(charId,charName);
  cs.initAt=now();
  if(opts.aliases)cs.aliases=safeArr(opts.aliases).map(trim).filter(Boolean).slice(0,10);
  if(opts.value!=null)cs.value=boundedInt(opts.value,-100,100,0);
  if(opts.depth!=null){cs.depth=Math.max(0, Number(opts.depth)||0);cs.stage=depthToStage(cs.depth)}
  addCLog(cs,'init','角色初始化: '+charName);
  saveCS(charId,cs);

  var pf=defProfile();
  if(opts.preset&&typeof opts.preset==='object'){
    PROFILE_DIMS.forEach(function(dim){
      if(opts.preset[dim]&&PROFILE_RULES[dim]&&PROFILE_RULES[dim][opts.preset[dim]])pf[dim]=opts.preset[dim];
    });
    pf.source='preset';
  }
  if(trim(opts.presetSummary||''))pf.summary=trim(opts.presetSummary||'');
  savePF(charId,pf);
  saveDY(charId,defDynamics(charId));
  try{syncProfileWB(charId,charName,'').catch(function(e){try{var s=load();addLog(s,'system','画像世界书同步失败: '+String(e&&e.message||e));save(s)}catch(_){}})}catch(_){}
  addLog(state,'init','新角色追踪：'+visibleNameOf(state,charId,charName),{charId:charId,charName:visibleNameOf(state,charId,charName)});
  save(state);
  try{syncPromptVars(state)}catch(_){}
  return{ok:true,charId:charId,charName:charName};
}

function removeChar(state,charId){
  var chars=state.roster&&state.roster.characters||{};
  if(!chars[charId])return false;
  var charName=visibleNameOf(state,charId,'');
  delete chars[charId];
  state.roster.activeOrder=(state.roster.activeOrder||[]).filter(function(c){return c!==charId});
  state.scene=state.scene&&typeof state.scene==='object'?state.scene:{present:[],lastUpdatedTurn:0};
  state.scene.present=safeArr(state.scene.present).filter(function(c){return c!==charId});
  if(trim(state.roster.mainCharId||'')===charId)state.roster.mainCharId=state.roster.activeOrder[0]||'';
  if(trim(state.roster.focusCharId||'')===charId)state.roster.focusCharId=state.roster.activeOrder[0]||'';
  rebuildAliasIndex(state);
  rawUnset(csKey(charId),'chat');rawUnset(pfKey(charId),'chat');rawUnset(dyKey(charId),'chat');
  addLog(state,'system','移除角色追踪：'+(charName||'该角色'),{charId:charId,charName:charName||''});
  save(state);
  try{syncPromptVars(state)}catch(_){}
  return true;
}
/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   识别当前聊天主角色
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

async function bootstrapAutoTrackCurrentCharacter(force){
  var state=load();
  state.sync=state.sync&&typeof state.sync==='object'?state.sync:{};
  if(trim(state.sync.mainCharacterBoundId||''))return false;
  if(trim(state.roster&&state.roster.mainCharId||'')){
    state.sync.mainCharacterBoundId=trim(state.roster.mainCharId||'');
    state.sync.mainCharacterBoundName=visibleNameOf(state,state.sync.mainCharacterBoundId,'');
    save(state);
    return false;
  }
  var info=null;

  try{
    info=await getCurrentCharInfo();
  }catch(_){
    return false;
  }

  var charId=trim(info&&info.charId||'');
  var charName=trim(info&&info.charName||'');
  if(!charId||!charName)return false;

  var aliases=safeArr(info&&info.aliases).map(trim).filter(Boolean).slice(0,10);

  state.roster=state.roster&&typeof state.roster==='object'
    ? state.roster
    : {characters:{},activeOrder:[],mainCharId:'',focusCharId:''};

  state.roster.characters=state.roster.characters&&typeof state.roster.characters==='object'
    ? state.roster.characters
    : {};

  state.scene=state.scene&&typeof state.scene==='object'
    ? state.scene
    : {present:[],lastUpdatedTurn:0};

  state.ui=state.ui&&typeof state.ui==='object'
    ? state.ui
    : {};

  var existed=!!state.roster.characters[charId];

  if(!existed){
    var initRes=initChar(state,charId,charName,{
      role:'main',
      aliases:aliases,
      present:true,
      value:0,
      depth:0
    });
    if(!initRes||!initRes.ok)return false;

    state=load();
    state.roster=state.roster&&typeof state.roster==='object'
      ? state.roster
      : {characters:{},activeOrder:[],mainCharId:'',focusCharId:''};

    state.roster.characters=state.roster.characters&&typeof state.roster.characters==='object'
      ? state.roster.characters
      : {};

    state.scene=state.scene&&typeof state.scene==='object'
      ? state.scene
      : {present:[],lastUpdatedTurn:0};

    state.ui=state.ui&&typeof state.ui==='object'
      ? state.ui
      : {};
  }

  state.sync.mainCharacterBoundId=charId;
  state.sync.mainCharacterBoundName=visibleNameOf(state,charId,charName);
  addLog(state,'init','已识别当前聊天角色：'+visibleNameOf(state,charId,charName),{charId:charId,charName:visibleNameOf(state,charId,charName)});
  save(state);
  try{syncPromptVars(state)}catch(_){}
  return true;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   玩家修正（契约 §14）
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

function applyCorrection(charId,corr){
  var cs=loadCS(charId);if(!cs)return false;
  var rec={id:uid('corr'),ts:now(),type:corr.type||'manual',before:{},after:{},reason:trim(corr.reason||'')};

  if(corr.valueSet!=null){
    var nv=boundedInt(corr.valueSet,-100,100,0);
    rec.before.value=cs.value;
    rec.valueSet=nv;
    cs.value=nv;
    rec.after.value=cs.value;
  }
  if(corr.depthSet!=null){
    var nd=boundedInt(corr.depthSet,0,100,0);
    rec.before.depth=cs.depth;
    rec.depthSet=nd;
    cs.depth=nd;
    cs.stage=depthToStage(cs.depth);
    rec.after.depth=cs.depth;rec.after.stage=cs.stage;
  }
  if(corr.tagChanges&&typeof corr.tagChanges==='object'){
    rec.before.tags={};rec.after.tags={};
    Object.keys(corr.tagChanges).forEach(function(tn){
      var nv=boundedInt(corr.tagChanges[tn],0,5,0);
      /* v2：写入印象层 */
      var imp=cs.impression&&cs.impression[tn];
      if(imp&&!imp.locked){
        rec.before.tags[tn]=imp.str;imp.str=nv;rec.after.tags[tn]=nv;
      }
    });
  }
  if(corr.impressionProgress&&typeof corr.impressionProgress==='object'){
    /* v2：可单独调整印象进度 */
    Object.keys(corr.impressionProgress).forEach(function(tn){
      var imp=cs.impression&&cs.impression[tn];
      if(imp&&!imp.locked){imp.progress=boundedInt(corr.impressionProgress[tn],0,99,0)}
    });
  }
  cs.corrections.push(rec);
  if(cs.corrections.length>100)cs.corrections=cs.corrections.slice(-80);
  addCLog(cs,'correction','玩家修正: '+(corr.reason||'手动调整'));
  saveCS(charId,cs);
  try{syncPromptVars(load())}catch(_){}
  return true;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   数据导出/清空
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

function exportAll(state){
  var data={state:state,chars:{}};
  Object.keys(state.roster&&state.roster.characters||{}).forEach(function(cid){
    data.chars[cid]={state:loadCS(cid),profile:loadPF(cid),dynamics:loadDY(cid)};
  });
  return data;
}
function clearAll(state){
  Object.keys(state.roster&&state.roster.characters||{}).forEach(function(cid){
    rawUnset(csKey(cid),'chat');rawUnset(pfKey(cid),'chat');rawUnset(dyKey(cid),'chat');
  });
  var fresh=defState();fresh.chatId=state.chatId;
  rawSet(stKey(fresh.chatId),fresh,'chat');
  addLog(fresh,'system','全部数据已清空');
  try{syncPromptVars(fresh)}catch(_){}
  return fresh;
}

function ensureRoot(){
  var pc=platformCore();
  if(pc&&pc.ensureDeviceShell)return pc.ensureDeviceShell({rootId:ROOT_ID,prefix:'rel',appId:'rel-app',overlayId:'rel-overlay',toastId:'rel-toast',hasOverlay:true});
  var r=D.getElementById(ROOT_ID);if(r)return r;
  r=D.createElement('div');r.id=ROOT_ID;
  r.innerHTML="<div class='rel-mask' data-base-close='1'></div><div class='rel-wrap'><div class='rel-device'><div class='rel-app' id='rel-app'></div><div class='rel-overlay' id='rel-overlay'></div><div class='rel-toast' id='rel-toast'></div></div></div>";
  D.body.appendChild(r);return r;
}

function ensurePanelAlive(){try{ensureStyle();ensureRoot();bindBase();app.runtime=app.runtime||{};app.runtime.rootAlive=true}catch(e){console.warn('[关系面板]',e)}}

function relToast(t){
  var pc=platformCore();if(pc&&pc.toast)return pc.toast(t,{root:ensureRoot(),prefix:'rel',toastId:'rel-toast'});
  var e=q('#rel-toast',ensureRoot());if(!e)return;
  var timerHost=(T&&T.setTimeout)?T:(typeof window!=='undefined'?window:null);
  try{if(app._toastTimer)(timerHost&&timerHost.clearTimeout?timerHost.clearTimeout:clearTimeout)(app._toastTimer)}catch(_){try{clearTimeout(app._toastTimer)}catch(_2){}}
  if(!t){
    e.classList.remove('show');e.textContent='';e.style.display='none';return;
  }
  e.style.display='block';
  e.textContent=t||'';
  e.classList.add('show');
  app._toastTimer=(timerHost&&timerHost.setTimeout?timerHost.setTimeout:setTimeout)(function(){
    try{e.classList.remove('show')}catch(_){}
    try{e.textContent=''}catch(_2){}
    try{e.style.display='none'}catch(_3){}
  },2200);
}

function openOverlay(title,sub,body){
  var o=q('#rel-overlay',ensureRoot());if(!o)return;
  o.innerHTML="<div class='rel-overlay-mask' data-overlay-close='1'></div><div class='rel-overlay-panel'><div class='rel-overlay-head'><div><div class='rel-overlay-title'>"+esc(title||'')+"</div><div class='rel-overlay-sub'>"+esc(sub||'')+"</div></div><button class='rel-close-btn' data-overlay-close='1'>×</button></div><div class='rel-overlay-body'>"+String(body||'')+"</div></div>";
  o.classList.add('open');
  try{if(app.ui&&app.ui.bindTextEditors)app.ui.bindTextEditors(o)}catch(_){}
}
function closeOverlay(){var o=q('#rel-overlay',ensureRoot());if(o)o.classList.remove('open')}

function openPanel(){
  if(!masterRelationEnabled()){relToast('关系系统当前已关闭，请先在总控里开启。');return false}
  ensurePanelAlive();app._relUserOpenedAt=now();
  var r=ensureRoot();r.classList.add('open');
  if(app.ui&&app.ui.ensureEntryPage){app.ui.ensureEntryPage();return}
  if(app.ui&&app.ui.renderAll)app.ui.renderAll(true);
  return true;
}
function closePanel(){ensureRoot().classList.remove('open');closeOverlay();/* 叉=直接退出回聊天，不回总控 */}
async function alignRelationCursorToCurrent(reason){
  var pc=platformCore();
  if(!pc||!pc.getMessageCount)return false;
  var state=load();
  state.turnState=state.turnState||{lastSummary:null,processedMessages:{},messageFloors:{},lastAssistantFloor:0,lastAssistantMessageId:'',lastSeenMessageCount:0,cursorBootstrapped:false,lastReconcileAt:0,lastReconcileReason:'',feedbackByMessage:{},feedbackByFloor:{},feedbackOrder:[],noChangeStreak:0,currentTurn:0};
  var total=await pc.getMessageCount();
  total=Number(total||0)||0;
  state.turnState.lastSeenMessageCount=total;
  state.turnState.cursorBootstrapped=true;
  state.turnState.lastReconcileAt=now();
  state.turnState.lastReconcileReason=trim(reason||'master-on-align');
  save(state);
  return true;
}

try{var _pc=platformCore();if(_pc&&_pc.registerForeground)_pc.registerForeground('relation',function(){scheduleAssistantReconcile('visibility',80,{forceRecent:true,lookback:6})})}catch(_fg){}

async function onMasterToggle(enabled){
  if(!enabled){
    stopAssistantRuntime('master-off');
    try{clearPromptVars()}catch(_vars){}
    try{closePanel()}catch(_close){}
    return false;
  }
  try{syncPromptVars(load())}catch(_sync){}
  try{await alignRelationCursorToCurrent('master-on')}catch(_align){}
  ensureRelationRuntime('master-on');
  return true;
}

var BASE_BIND_VER='20260609-relation-base';
function bindBase(){
  var r=ensureRoot();if(r.getAttribute('data-base-bound')===BASE_BIND_VER)return;r.setAttribute('data-base-bound',BASE_BIND_VER);r.removeAttribute('data-rel-base-bound');
  r.addEventListener('click',function(e){
    var n=e.target.closest?e.target.closest('[data-base-close],[data-overlay-close]'):null;
    if(!n)return;e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();
    if(n.hasAttribute('data-base-close'))closePanel();
    if(n.hasAttribute('data-overlay-close'))closeOverlay();
  },true);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════
   AssistantPost 钩子 — 每轮自动结算
   ═══════════════════════════════════ */

async function processAssistantPost(msg){
  if(!masterRelationEnabled())return;
  var state=load();
try{
  await bootstrapAutoTrackCurrentCharacter(false);
  state=load();
}catch(_){}

  var text=messageContentOf(msg);
  if(!text)return;
  var detectedRaw=extractBlock(text);
  state.turnState=state.turnState||{lastSummary:null,processedMessages:{},messageFloors:{},lastAssistantFloor:0,lastAssistantMessageId:'',lastSeenMessageCount:0,cursorBootstrapped:false,lastReconcileAt:0,lastReconcileReason:'',feedbackByMessage:{},feedbackByFloor:{},feedbackOrder:[],noChangeStreak:0,currentTurn:0};
  var binding=await resolveMessageBinding(msg,state);
  var mid=trim(binding.messageId||messageIdOf(msg)||'');
  if(!mid){
    noteProcess('',0,false,!!detectedRaw,'missing_message_id',0);
    if(detectedRaw){
      addLog(state,'protocol','消息绑定失败：发现关系块但未拿到消息 ID',{status:'err',detail:'已检测到关系机器块，但当前消息没有稳定 messageId；本轮不结算，避免把关系写到错误楼层。',code:'REL_MESSAGE_ID_MISSING'});
      save(state);
    }

  state=load();

  if(isMessageProcessed(state.turnState,mid)){noteProcess(mid,floorForMessage(state.turnState,mid),false,!!detectedRaw,'already_processed',0);return;}

  }

      addLog(state,'protocol',floorLabel(binding.floorL)+'发现关系块，但没有追踪角色',{turn:binding.floorL,floorL:binding.floorL,detail:'请先在关系系统中开始追踪角色；没有追踪对象时不会结算。',code:'REL_NO_TRACKED_TARGET'});
      save(state);
    }
    if(state.settings.cleanMachineBlock!==false)await cleanVisibleMachineBlock(msg,text,null);

  }

function detachAssistantPostHook(){
  try{
    if(app._hookTarget&&app._hookProxy&&app._hookTarget.onAssistantMessagePost===app._hookProxy){
      app._hookTarget.onAssistantMessagePost=app._hookPrev||null;
      diagPush('hook.detach',{ok:true,note:'restore-prev'});

}
function stopAssistantRuntime(reason){
  try{if(app._msgObserver)app._msgObserver.disconnect()}catch(_obs){}
  app._msgObserver=null;

  noteHookAttach(reason||'stopped');
  try{diagPush('runtime.stop',{ok:true,note:reason||'master-off'})}catch(_diag){}
  return true;
}
function ensureRelationRuntime(reason){
  if(!masterRelationEnabled())return false;
  ensureAssistantPostHook(reason||'runtime');
  startAssistantPostHookWatch();
  startAssistantMessageObserver();
  scheduleAssistantReconcile(reason||'boot',260,{forceRecent:false,lookback:6});
  diagPush('init.ready',{ok:hookAttachedNow(),note:'relation-core'});
  return true;
}
function ensureAssistantPostHook(reason){
  if(!masterRelationEnabled())return false;
  if(!TV)return false;
  ensureDiag();
  if(TV.onAssistantMessagePost===app._hookProxy&&app._hookProxy){
    hookAttachedNow();
    if(reason)diagPush('hook.check',{ok:true,note:reason});
    return true;
  }
  var prev=TV.onAssistantMessagePost;
  if(prev===app._hookProxy)prev=app._hookPrev||null;
  var proxy=function(msg){
    if(prev)try{prev(msg)}catch(_){}
    noteHookEvent(messageIdOf(msg));
    Promise.resolve().then(function(){return processAssistantPost(msg)}).then(function(){
      app._lastRelPostHookAt=now();
    }).catch(function(e){
      app._lastRelPostHookAt=0;
      try{ensureDiag().hook.lastError=String(e&&e.message||e||'');diagPush('hook.error',{ok:false,messageId:messageIdOf(msg),note:String(e&&e.message||e||'')})}catch(_diag){}
      try{var s=load();addLog(s,'system','结算异常: '+String(e&&e.message||e));save(s)}catch(_){}
    });
  };
  app._hookPrev=prev||null;
  app._hookProxy=proxy;
  app._hookTarget=TV;
  TV.onAssistantMessagePost=proxy;
  app._hookReg=true;
  noteHookAttach(reason||'boot');
  return hookAttachedNow();
}
function startAssistantPostHookWatch(){
  try{if(app._hookWatchTimer)clearInterval(app._hookWatchTimer)}catch(_){}
  app._hookWatchTimer=setInterval(function(){
    try{
      if(D.hidden)return;
      if(!hookAttachedNow())ensureAssistantPostHook('watchdog');
    }catch(_){}
  },20000);
}
function startAssistantMessageObserver(){
  try{if(app._msgObserver)app._msgObserver.disconnect()}catch(_){}
  if(typeof MutationObserver==='undefined'||!D||!D.body)return;
  var roots=qa('.tav-chat-container,.tav-items,.mes_board,.messages,.chat-messages',D).filter(Boolean);
  if(!roots.length)return;
  var obs=new MutationObserver(function(list){
    var touched=false;
    for(var i=0;i<list.length;i++){
      var one=list[i];
      if(one&&one.type==='childList'&&one.addedNodes&&one.addedNodes.length){
        for(var j=0;j<one.addedNodes.length;j++){
          var n=one.addedNodes[j];
          if(n&&n.nodeType===1){touched=true;break}
        }
      }
      if(touched)break;
    }
    if(!touched)return;
    diagPush('observer.event',{ok:true,note:'dom-added'});
    scheduleAssistantReconcile('dom-mutation',650,{forceRecent:false,lookback:4});
  });
  roots.forEach(function(root){
    try{obs.observe(root,{childList:true,subtree:true})}catch(_observe){}
  });
  app._msgObserver=obs;
  diagPush('observer.start',{ok:true,note:roots.length>1?'multi-root':'single-root'});
}

if(typeof TV!=='undefined'&&TV){
  Promise.resolve().then(function(){return onMasterToggle(masterRelationEnabled())}).catch(function(_){});
}

}catch(e){
  try{console.error('[关系核心] 初始化失败:',e)}catch(_){}
}
})();

}

function defInitDraft(){
  return{charId:'',charName:'',charDesc:'',aliases:[],presetName:'通用',dims:{},advancedOpen:false,fetchStatus:'idle',lastFetchedAt:0};
}

function normUi(ui){
  var d=defUi();ui=ui&&typeof ui==='object'?ui:{};
  d.page=trim(ui.page||'home')||'home';
  d.stack=safeArr(ui.stack).filter(function(x){return x&&typeof x==='object'}).slice(-20);
  d.pageState=ui.pageState&&typeof ui.pageState==='object'?ui.pageState:{};
  d.archiveTab=trim(ui.archiveTab||'status')||'status';
  d.dynamicTab=trim(ui.dynamicTab||'timeline')||'timeline';
  d.correctionTab=trim(ui.correctionTab||'manual')||'manual';
  d.settingsTab=trim(ui.settingsTab||'system')||'system';
  if(d.settingsTab==='api')d.settingsTab='system';
  d.focusCharId=trim(ui.focusCharId||'');
  d.logsReadCount=Number(ui.logsReadCount||0)||0;
  d.helpSeen=!!ui.helpSeen;
  d.helpTab=trim(ui.helpTab||'start')||'start';
  return d;
}

function ensureInitDraft(state){
  state.ui=normUi(state.ui);
  var pageState=state.ui.pageState&&typeof state.ui.pageState==='object'?state.ui.pageState:{};
  var src=pageState.initDraft&&typeof pageState.initDraft==='object'?pageState.initDraft:{};
  var draft=defInitDraft();
  draft.charId=trim(src.charId||'');
  draft.charName=trim(src.charName||'');
  draft.charDesc=trim(src.charDesc||'');
  draft.aliases=safeArr(src.aliases).map(trim).filter(Boolean).slice(0,10);
  draft.presetName=trim(src.presetName||'通用')||'通用';
  draft.dims=src.dims&&typeof src.dims==='object'?Object.assign({},src.dims):{};
  draft.advancedOpen=!!src.advancedOpen;
  draft.fetchStatus=trim(src.fetchStatus||'idle')||'idle';
  draft.lastFetchedAt=Number(src.lastFetchedAt||0)||0;
  pageState.initDraft=draft;
  state.ui.pageState=pageState;
  return draft;
}

function readInitDraftFromState(state){
  var draft=ensureInitDraft(state);
  return{
    charId:draft.charId,
    charName:draft.charName,
    charDesc:draft.charDesc,
    aliases:safeArr(draft.aliases).slice(),
    presetName:draft.presetName,
    dims:Object.assign({},draft.dims||{}),
    advancedOpen:!!draft.advancedOpen,
    fetchStatus:draft.fetchStatus,
    lastFetchedAt:draft.lastFetchedAt
  };
}

function writeInitDraft(state,patch){
  var draft=ensureInitDraft(state);
  patch=patch&&typeof patch==='object'?patch:{};
  if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(patch,'charId'))draft.charId=trim(patch.charId||'');
  if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(patch,'charName'))draft.charName=trim(patch.charName||'');
  if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(patch,'charDesc'))draft.charDesc=trim(patch.charDesc||'');
  if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(patch,'aliases'))draft.aliases=safeArr(patch.aliases).map(trim).filter(Boolean).slice(0,10);
  if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(patch,'presetName'))draft.presetName=trim(patch.presetName||'通用')||'通用';
  if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(patch,'dims'))draft.dims=patch.dims&&typeof patch.dims==='object'?Object.assign({},patch.dims):{};
  if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(patch,'advancedOpen'))draft.advancedOpen=!!patch.advancedOpen;
  if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(patch,'fetchStatus'))draft.fetchStatus=trim(patch.fetchStatus||'idle')||'idle';
  if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(patch,'lastFetchedAt'))draft.lastFetchedAt=Number(patch.lastFetchedAt||0)||0;
  state.ui.pageState.initDraft=draft;
  return draft;
}

function clearInitDraft(state){
  state.ui=normUi(state.ui);
  state.ui.pageState=state.ui.pageState&&typeof state.ui.pageState==='object'?state.ui.pageState:{};
  state.ui.pageState.initDraft=defInitDraft();
  return state.ui.pageState.initDraft;
}

async function fetchCurrentCharIntoDraft(force){
  var s=loadState();
  var draft=ensureInitDraft(s);
  if(!force&&draft.charId&&draft.fetchStatus==='ok')return readInitDraftFromState(s);
  writeInitDraft(s,{fetchStatus:'loading'});
  saveState(s);
  renderAll(true);
  if(!core().getCurrentCharInfo){
    s=loadState();writeInitDraft(s,{fetchStatus:'error',lastFetchedAt:now()});saveState(s);renderAll(true);return null;
  }
  try{
    var info=await core().getCurrentCharInfo();
    s=loadState();
    var cur=ensureInitDraft(s);
    if(info&&info.charId){
      writeInitDraft(s,{
        charId:info.charId,
        charName:info.charName||info.name||'',
        charDesc:info.charDesc||info.description||'',
        aliases:safeArr(info.aliases).map(trim).filter(Boolean).slice(0,10),
        presetName:cur.presetName||'通用',
        dims:cur.dims||{},
        advancedOpen:!!cur.advancedOpen,
        fetchStatus:'ok',
        lastFetchedAt:now()
      });
    }else{
      writeInitDraft(s,{charId:'',charName:'',charDesc:'',fetchStatus:'empty',lastFetchedAt:now()});
    }
    saveState(s);
    renderAll(true);
    return readInitDraftFromState(s);
  }catch(_){
    s=loadState();
    writeInitDraft(s,{fetchStatus:'error',lastFetchedAt:now()});
    saveState(s);
    renderAll(true);
    return null;
  }
}

function loadState(){
  var s=core().load?core().load():(core().defState?core().defState():{roster:{characters:{},activeOrder:[]},pending:[],logs:[],settings:{},meta:{}});
  s.ui=normUi(s.ui);
  try{if(core().rawGet&&core().rawGet('fifth_season_relation_help_seen','global'))s.ui.helpSeen=true}catch(_help){}
  if(s.ui.pageState&&s.ui.pageState.initDraft)ensureInitDraft(s);
  return s;
}

function saveState(s){
  s.ui=normUi(s.ui);
  if(s.ui.pageState&&s.ui.pageState.initDraft)ensureInitDraft(s);
  try{if(s.ui.helpSeen&&core().rawSet)core().rawSet('fifth_season_relation_help_seen',true,'global')}catch(_help){}
  var ok=true;
  if(core().save)ok=core().save(s)!==false;
  if(!ok)toast('保存失败，请导出诊断报告');
  return ok;
}
function trackedIds(s){return safeArr(s&&s.roster&&s.roster.activeOrder).filter(Boolean)}
function getCS(cid){return core().loadCS?core().loadCS(cid):null}
function getPF(cid){return core().loadPF?core().loadPF(cid):(core().defProfile?core().defProfile():{})}
function getDY(cid){return core().loadDY?core().loadDY(cid):null}
function firstCharId(s){var ids=trackedIds(s);return ids[0]||''}
function selectedCharId(s){
  var ids=trackedIds(s);if(!ids.length)return'';
  var ps=s.ui&&s.ui.pageState||{};
  var cid=trim(ps.charId||s.ui.focusCharId||'');
  return ids.indexOf(cid)>=0?cid:ids[0];
}
function selectedChar(s){var cid=selectedCharId(s);return cid?getCS(cid):null}
function valueLabel(v){return core().valueTendency?core().valueTendency(v):(v>20?'升温':v<-20?'疏离':'平稳')}
function valCls(v){return v>0?'pos':v<0?'neg':'mid'}
function stageIndex(st){var arr=core().STAGES||[];var i=arr.indexOf(st);return i<0?0:i}
function initialOf(name){name=trim(name||'?');return name.slice(0,1)||'?'}
function signedValueText(v){v=Number(v||0)||0;return v>0?('+'+v):String(v)}
function displayNameOf(s,cid,fallback){
  s=s||loadState();
  var cs=cid?getCS(cid):null;
  var roster=s&&s.roster&&s.roster.characters&&s.roster.characters[cid]||{};
  var name=trim(fallback||cs&&cs.charName||cs&&cs.name||roster.displayName||roster.name||'');
  return name||trim(cid||'')||'未命名角色';
}
function selectedCharacterView(s){
  var cid=selectedCharId(s);
  var cs=cid?getCS(cid):null;
  return{cid:cid,cs:cs||{charName:'未命名角色',value:0,depth:0,stage:'初见'}};
}
function stageSegmentsHtml(stage){
  var stages=core().STAGES||['初见','相识','熟悉','牵连','深涉','核心'];
  var idx=stageIndex(stage);
  return stages.map(function(_,i){return"<div class='hero-stage-seg"+(i<idx?' filled':'')+(i===idx?' current':'')+"'></div>"}).join('');
}
function heroNavHtml(s,ids,cur){
  if(ids.length<2)return'';
  return"<div class='hero-nav'>"+ids.map(function(cid){
    return"<button class='hero-nav-dot"+(cid===cur?' active':'')+"' data-act='select-char' data-cid='"+esc(cid)+"'></button>";
  }).join('')+"</div>";
}
function closeCharMenus(root,except){
  root=root||uiRoot();
  qa('.rel-char-switcher',root).forEach(function(sw){
    if(except&&sw===except)return;
    var dd=q('.rel-char-dropdown',sw),tg=q('.rel-char-trigger',sw);
    if(dd)dd.classList.remove('show');
    if(tg)tg.classList.remove('open');
  });
}
function charSwitcherHtml(s){
  s=s||loadState();
  var ids=trackedIds(s);
  if(!ids.length)return'';
  var cur=selectedCharId(s);
  var curName=displayNameOf(s,cur,'');
  var curCs=getCS(cur)||{stage:'初见',value:0};
  var options=ids.map(function(cid){
    var cs=getCS(cid)||{stage:'初见',value:0};
    var name=displayNameOf(s,cid,'');
    return"<button class='rel-char-option"+(cid===cur?' on':'')+"' data-act='select-char' data-cid='"+esc(cid)+"'><span class='avatar'>"+esc(initialOf(name))+"</span><div class='opt-info'><span class='opt-name'>"+esc(name)+"</span><span class='opt-sub'>"+esc(cs.stage||'初见')+" · "+esc(signedValueText(cs.value||0))+"</span></div></button>";
  }).join('');
  return"<div class='rel-char-switcher'><button class='rel-char-trigger' data-act='toggle-char-menu'><span class='avatar'>"+esc(initialOf(curName))+"</span><span class='trigger-name'>"+esc(curName)+"</span>"+(ids.length>1?"<span class='trigger-arrow'>▼</span>":"")+"</button>"+(ids.length>1?"<div class='rel-char-dropdown'>"+options+"</div>":"")+"</div>";
}
function visibleLogSummary(l){
  l=l||{};
  var sum=trim(l.summary||'');
  var charName=trim(l.charName||'');
  function stripIdSuffix(text){
    return trim(String(text||'').replace(/\s*\((?:npc_[0-9a-z_]+|\d+)\)\s*$/i,''));
  }
  if(/^(新角色追踪|自动绑定当前聊天角色|同步当前聊天角色)[:：]/.test(sum)){
    if(charName)return RegExp.$1+'：'+charName;
    return stripIdSuffix(sum);
  }
  if(/^(移除角色追踪)[:：]/.test(sum)){
    if(charName)return'移除角色追踪：'+charName;
    return trim(sum.replace(/[:：]\s*(?:npc_[0-9a-z_]+|\d+)\s*$/i,''));
  }
  return stripIdSuffix(sum);
}

function goPage(s,page,patch){
  s.ui=normUi(s.ui);
  var cur={page:s.ui.page||'home',pageState:s.ui.pageState||{}};
  if(cur.page!==page)s.ui.stack.push(cur);

  var keepDraft=s.ui.pageState&&s.ui.pageState.initDraft&&typeof s.ui.pageState.initDraft==='object'
    ? readInitDraftFromState(s)
    : null;

  s.ui.page=page;
  s.ui.pageState=patch||{};

  if(page==='init'){
    if(keepDraft)s.ui.pageState.initDraft=keepDraft;
    ensureInitDraft(s);
  }

  if(patch&&patch.charId)s.ui.focusCharId=patch.charId;

  saveState(s);
  renderAll(true);
}


function nav(page,patch){
  var s=loadState();
  patch=patch||{};
  if(page==='settings'&&patch.tab)s.ui.settingsTab=patch.tab;
  if(page==='correction'&&patch.tab)s.ui.correctionTab=patch.tab;
  if(page==='archive'&&patch.tab)s.ui.archiveTab=patch.tab;
  if(page==='dynamics'&&patch.tab)s.ui.dynamicTab=patch.tab;
  return goPage(s,page||'home',patch);
}

function backPage(s){
  s.ui=normUi(s.ui);
  var prev=s.ui.stack.pop();
  if(prev){
    s.ui.page=prev.page||'home';
    s.ui.pageState=prev.pageState||{};
  }else{
    s.ui.page='home';
    s.ui.pageState={};
  }
  if(s.ui.page==='init')ensureInitDraft(s);
  saveState(s);
  renderAll(true);
}

function homePage(s){
  s.ui=normUi(s.ui);
  s.ui.page='home';
  s.ui.pageState={};
  s.ui.stack=[];
  saveState(s);
  renderAll(true);
}

function closePage(s){
  s=s||loadState();
  var origin=s.ui.pageState&&s.ui.pageState.entryOrigin||'';
  if(origin==='feedback'){
    if(base().close)base().close();
    return;
  }
  if(s.ui.stack&&s.ui.stack.length){
    return backPage(s);
  }
  if(base().close)base().close();
}

function unreadLogsCount(s){
  var readAt=Number(s&&s.uiUnread&&s.uiUnread.logsReadAt||0)||0;
  return safeArr(s&&s.logs).filter(function(x){return Number(x&&x.ts||0)>readAt}).length;
}

function headerHome(s){
  var unread=unreadLogsCount(s);
  var helpSeen=!!(s.ui&&s.ui.helpSeen);
  return"<div class='rel-header'><div class='rel-header-top'><div class='rel-brand'>第五季果汁</div>"+charSwitcherHtml(s)+"<div class='rel-header-actions'>"+
    "<div class='rel-guide-wrap'>"+
      "<button class='rel-guide-btn "+(helpSeen?'read':'')+"' data-act='open-help'>"+(helpSeen?'帮助':'使用说明')+(helpSeen?'':'<span class=\"rel-guide-dot\"></span>')+"</button>"+
      (helpSeen?'':"<div class='rel-guide-pop'>使用说明</div>")+
    "</div>"+
    "<button class='rel-icon-btn' data-act='go-logs' style='font-size:14px;position:relative'><span>📋</span>"+(unread?"<span class='rel-badge'>"+Math.min(99,unread)+"</span>":"")+"</button>"+
    "<button class='rel-icon-btn' data-act='close-page'>×</button>"+
  "</div></div></div>";
}

function headerSub(title,s){
  return"<div class='rel-head'><div class='rel-head-bar'><button class='rel-back-btn' data-act='back'>←</button><div class='rel-head-title'>"+esc(title)+"</div>"+charSwitcherHtml(s)+"<button class='rel-close-btn' data-act='close-page'>×</button></div></div>";
}

function tabsHtml(kind,active,tabs){
  return"<div class='rel-tabs'>"+tabs.map(function(t){
    return"<button class='rel-tab "+(active===t.id?'on':'')+"' data-"+kind+"-tab='"+esc(t.id)+"'>"+esc(t.label)+"</button>";
  }).join('')+"</div>";
}

function homeHtml(s){
  var ids=trackedIds(s);
  var pending=safeArr(s.pending).length;
  var round=Number(s.meta&&s.meta.round||0)||0;
  var picked=selectedCharacterView(s),cur=picked.cid,cs=picked.cs;

  var noRoleCard=!ids.length
    ?("<div class='rel-card' style='margin:16px 16px 0'><div class='rel-card-title'>当前还没有可追踪角色</div><div class='rel-card-text'>主角色只会在首次导入时自动绑定。若当前聊天角色尚未识别成功，你也可以手动追加其他 NPC。</div><div class='rel-actions'><button class='rel-btn primary full' data-nav='init'>追加角色</button></div></div>")
    :"";

  return "<div class='rel-page'>"+headerHome(s)+"<div class='rel-scroll'>"+
    (ids.length?("<div class='rel-hero'>"+
      "<div class='hero-top'><div class='hero-top-left'><span class='hero-chip'><span class='dot'></span>"+(s.settings&&s.settings.enabled!==false?'运行中':'已暂停')+"</span></div>"+
      "<span class='hero-floor'>"+round+"L</span></div>"+
      "<div class='hero-name-row'><div class='hero-char-name'>"+esc(displayNameOf(s,cur,cs.charName||''))+"</div>"+
      "<span class='hero-temp'>"+esc(valueLabel(cs.value||0))+"</span></div>"+
      "<div class='hero-stage-row'><span class='hero-stage-label'>"+esc(cs.stage||'初见')+"</span><div class='hero-stage-bar'>"+stageSegmentsHtml(cs.stage||'初见')+"</div></div>"+
      "<div class='hero-metrics'><div class='hero-metric'><div class='mv'>"+esc(signedValueText(cs.value||0))+"</div><div class='ml'>关系值</div></div>"+
      "<div class='hero-metric'><div class='mv'>"+esc(cs.depth||0)+"</div><div class='ml'>深度</div></div></div>"+
      heroNavHtml(s,ids,cur)+"</div>"):"")+
    noRoleCard+
    "<div class='rel-entry-grid'>"+
      entryCard('archive','👥','角色总览','状态 · 近期变化 · 画像',ids.length)+
      entryCard('dynamics','🔄','关系动态','时间线 · 动力事件',pending)+
      entryCard('correction','🧭','修正中心','手动校准 · 准则',0)+
      entryCard('settings','⚙️','设置','系统 · 数据 · 日志',0)+
    "</div>"+
    "<div class='rel-tips'><div class='rel-tips-box'>主角色首次导入自动绑定。这里查看关系状态、近期变化与动力事件。</div></div>"+
  "</div></div>";
}


function entryCard(page,icon,name,desc,count){
  return"<div class='rel-entry-card' data-nav='"+page+"'>"+(count?"<div class='rel-entry-count'>"+count+"</div>":"")+"<div class='rel-entry-icon'>"+icon+"</div><div class='rel-entry-name'>"+esc(name)+"</div><div class='rel-entry-desc'>"+esc(desc)+"</div></div>";
}

function charStrip(s){
  return"";
}

function trackCard(cs){
  var v=Number(cs.value||0),pos=(v+100)/2,fill=Math.abs(v)/100*50,left=v>=0?50:50-fill;
  var stages=core().STAGES||['初见','相识','熟悉','信任','羁绊'];
  var si=stageIndex(cs.stage);
  /* v2：阶段成熟度标签（早/中/晚） */
  var matLabel='';
  try{if(core().stageMaturityOf){var m=core().stageMaturityOf(cs);var ML=core().MATURITY_LABEL||{};matLabel=ML[m]||''}}catch(_){}
  return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-track-row'><div><div class='rel-track-name'>"+esc(cs.charName||cs.charId)+"</div><div class='rel-track-meta'>"+esc(cs.stage)+(matLabel?(' · '+esc(matLabel)):'')+" · 深度 "+esc(cs.depth)+"</div></div><div class='rel-track-val "+valCls(v)+"'>"+(v>0?'+':'')+v+"</div></div><div class='rel-track-bar'><div class='rel-track-center'></div><div class='rel-track-fill' style='left:"+left+"%;width:"+fill+"%'></div><div class='rel-track-cursor' style='left:"+pos+"%'></div></div><div class='rel-scale'><span>-100</span><span>0</span><span>+100</span></div><div class='rel-depth-bar'>"+stages.map(function(st,i){return"<span class='"+(i<=si?'on':'')+"'>"+esc(st)+"</span>"}).join('')+"</div></div>";
}

/* v2：印象层卡片（关系词 + 进度/档位），取代旧 tagsCard */
function impressionCard(cs){
  var imp=cs.impression||{};
  var axis=cs.characterAxes||{};
  var labels=core().STR_LABELS||['无','微弱','轻','明显','强烈','极端'];
  var axisLabels=core().AXIS_LABELS||['无感','模糊','有点','明显','强烈','固化'];
  var attitudeItems=Object.keys(imp).map(function(tn){
    var it=imp[tn];if(!it||Number(it.str||0)<=0)return'';
    return "<div class='rel-grid-chip att'><span>"+esc(tn)+"</span><span class='gc-lv'>"+esc(labels[Number(it.str)]||'轻')+"</span></div>";
  }).filter(Boolean).join('');
  var axisItems=Object.keys(axis).map(function(tn){
    var it=axis[tn];if(!it||Number(it.str||0)<=0)return'';
    return "<div class='rel-grid-chip axis'><span>"+esc(tn)+"</span><span class='gc-lv'>"+esc(axisLabels[Number(it.str)]||'有点')+"</span></div>";
  }).filter(Boolean).join('');
  if(!attitudeItems)attitudeItems="<div class='rel-card-text' style='color:#8C95A6'>她对你的态度还不够明确。</div>";
  if(!axisItems)axisItems="<div class='rel-card-text' style='color:#8C95A6'>她还没有把你固定成某一种很明确的人。</div>";
  return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-label'>她对你的态度</div><div class='rel-chip-grid'>"+attitudeItems+"</div><div class='rel-label' style='margin-top:14px'>她眼中的你</div><div class='rel-chip-grid'>"+axisItems+"</div></div>";
}

/* v2：瞬时层情绪条（情绪词，流动，与印象视觉分层） */
function moodStrip(cs){
  var md=cs.mood||{};
  var labels=core().STR_LABELS||['无','微弱','轻','明显','强烈','极端'];
  var items=Object.keys(md).map(function(tn){
    var it=md[tn];if(!it||Number(it.str||0)<=0)return'';
    return "<div class='rel-grid-chip mood'><span>"+esc(tn)+"</span><span class='gc-lv'>"+esc(labels[Number(it.str)]||'轻')+" · "+esc(Number(it.decayIn||0)||1)+"轮</span></div>";
  }).filter(Boolean).join('');
  if(!items)items="<div class='rel-card-text' style='color:#8C95A6'>当前比较平稳。</div>";
  return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-label'>她这一刻的状态</div><div class='rel-chip-grid mood3'>"+items+"</div></div>";
}

/* v2：动力事件卡（done=true 才可见） */
function dynamicCard(cid,cs){
  var out=[];
  try{
    if(core().buildRelCtxObject){
      var relCtx=core().buildRelCtxObject(loadState())||{};
      var ch=safeArr(relCtx.characters).filter(function(x){return x&&x.id===cid})[0]||null;
      out=safeArr(ch&&ch.activeDynamics);
    }
  }catch(_){}
  if(!out.length)return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-label'>动力事件</div><div class='rel-card-text' style='color:#8C95A6'>当前没有触发的行为倾向。动力只在印象/情绪达标时提示，且 AI 照做（done:true）才会真正发生。</div></div>";
  var items=out.map(function(d){
    var w=d.weight==='heavy'?'重量':(d.weight==='light'?'轻量':'中量');
    return "<div class='rel-dyn-item'><div class='rel-dyn-ic "+esc(d.weight)+"'>"+esc(d.weight==='heavy'?'★':(d.weight==='light'?'·':'◆'))+"</div>"
      +"<div class='rel-dyn-info'><div class='rel-dyn-t'>"+esc(d.label||d.id)+"</div>"
      +"<div class='rel-dyn-d'>"+esc(d.prompt||'')+"</div>"
      +"<div class='rel-dyn-cond'>行为倾向 · "+esc(w)+" · hint: "+esc(d.hint||d.id)+"</div></div></div>";
  }).join('');
  return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-label'>动力事件（本轮提示）</div>"+items+"</div>";
}

function tagsCard(cs){
  /* v2 兼容：转发到 impressionCard */
  return impressionCard(cs);
}

/* v2 画像：6 维度竖排，每维两极进度条 + 解释文案（对照预览） */
function profileCard(cid){
  var pf=getPF(cid)||{};
  var dims=core().PROFILE_DIMS||[];
  var labels=core().PROFILE_DIM_LABEL||{};
  /* 每维度：左极 / 右极 / 值定位(0~1) / 解释文案 */
  var dimSpec={
    trustTendency:{left:'难以信任',right:'容易信任',explain:{
      '难以信任':'不会轻易交付信任，需要更长时间和更多证明才肯打开心防。',
      '容易信任':'容易交付信任，对情感变化较为敏感，愿意主动靠近。',
      '普通':'信任建立速度中等，既不轻易交付也不过度防备。'
    }},
    emotionSensitivity:{left:'迟钝',right:'敏感',explain:{
      '敏感':'对情绪和细节反应更强烈，开心更开心、受伤也更受伤。',
      '迟钝':'情绪反应相对平稳，不易大起大落。',
      '普通':'情绪反应适中，状态相对稳定。'
    }},
    conflictResilience:{left:'脆弱',right:'坚韧',explain:{
      '坚韧':'面对冲突不易退缩，情绪波动相对平稳。',
      '脆弱':'面对冲突容易受伤、退缩，波动较大。',
      '普通':'面对冲突的反应中等。'
    }},
    repairAcceptance:{left:'记仇',right:'易修复',explain:{
      '记仇':'冲突后修复困难，负向印象消退很慢。',
      '容易修复':'冲突后较易缓和，负向情绪消退快。',
      '普通':'冲突后修复速度中等。'
    }},
    attachmentMode:{left:'独立',right:'容易依附',explain:{
      '容易依附':'一旦信任建立，容易产生依赖感和忠诚倾向。',
      '独立':'倾向保持独立，不易产生依赖。',
      '普通':'依附倾向中等。'
    }},
    expressionStyle:{left:'内敛',right:'外显',explain:{
      '外显':'情绪外露，表达直接。',
      '内敛':'情绪不外露，多用行动和细节暗示。',
      '普通':'表达方式居中。'
    }}
  };
  function valPos(dim,val){
    /* val=左极 → 0；普通 → 0.5；右极 → 1 */
    var spec=dimSpec[dim]||{};
    if(val===spec.left)return 0.2;
    if(val===spec.right)return 0.8;
    return 0.5;
  }
  var hasDims=dims.some(function(dim){var v=trim(pf[dim]||'');return v&&v!=='普通'});
  var summary=trim(pf.summary||'');
  var summaryHtml=summary?("<div class='rel-card-text'>"+esc(summary)+"</div>"):'';

  var rowsHtml=dims.map(function(dim){
    var spec=dimSpec[dim]||{left:'',right:'',explain:{}};
    var val=trim(pf[dim]||'普通');
    var pos=valPos(dim,val);
    var explain=spec.explain[val]||spec.explain['普通']||'';
    return "<div class='rel-pf-row'>"+
      "<div class='rel-pf-left'>"+
        "<div class='rel-pf-dim'>"+esc(labels[dim]||dim)+"</div>"+
        "<div class='rel-pf-bar'><div class='rel-pf-bar-fill' style='width:"+(pos*100)+"%'></div></div>"+
        "<div class='rel-pf-scale'><span>"+esc(spec.left)+"</span><span>"+esc(spec.right)+"</span></div>"+
      "</div>"+
      "<div class='rel-pf-explain'><div class='rel-pf-explain-text'>"+esc(explain)+"</div></div>"+
    "</div>";
  }).join('');

  var genInfoHtml='';
  if(pf.source==='api'||pf.source==='manual'){
    var genAt=pf.generatedAt?fmt(pf.generatedAt):'';
    genInfoHtml="<div class='rel-item-meta' style='margin-bottom:8px'>"+esc(pf.source==='api'?'接口生成':'手动编辑')+(genAt?(" · "+esc(genAt)):'')+"</div>";
  }

  return "<div class='rel-card'>"+
    genInfoHtml+
    (hasDims?"<div class='rel-label'>角色画像</div>"+summaryHtml+"<div class='rel-pf-list'>"+rowsHtml+"</div>"
      :"<div class='rel-card-title'>角色画像</div><div class='rel-card-text'>"+esc(summary||'画像是关系变化的难度参数与演绎风格来源。点击“生成画像”后，先选择角色设定和世界书条目，再生成该角色画像。')+"</div>")+
    "<div class='rel-actions'><button class='rel-btn' data-act='edit-profile' data-cid='"+esc(cid)+"'>编辑画像</button><button class='rel-btn primary' data-act='gen-profile' data-cid='"+esc(cid)+"'>生成画像</button></div>"+
  "</div>";
}



function floorBadge(floorL){
  return floorL?String(floorL)+'L':'--';
}

function resultSnapshot(res){
  res=res||{};
  return{
    valueFrom:res.valueFrom!=null?(Number(res.valueFrom||0)||0):null,
    valueTo:res.valueTo!=null?(Number(res.valueTo||0)||0):null,
    depthFrom:res.depthFrom!=null?(Number(res.depthFrom||0)||0):null,
    depthTo:res.depthTo!=null?(Number(res.depthTo||0)||0):null,
    evidence:trim(res.evidence||res.event&&res.event.evidence||''),
    degradeReason:trim(res.degradeReason||res.ap&&res.ap.degradeReason||res.sr&&res.sr.degradeReason||''),
    mood:res.mood&&trim(res.mood.tag||''),
    impressionChange:res.impressionChange||null,
    tagChanges:safeArr(res.tagChanges).filter(function(t){return Number(t.to||0)!==Number(t.from||0)}).map(function(t){return trim(t.tag||'')}),
    axisChanges:safeArr(res.axisChanges||[])
  };
}

function relFeedbackRows(s,cid,onlyChanged,modeFilter){
  var state=s||loadState();
  var ts=state&&state.turnState||{};
  var order=safeArr(ts.feedbackOrder).slice().reverse();
  var rows=[];
  var seen={};
  modeFilter=trim(modeFilter||'all');
  order.forEach(function(meta){
    var floorL=Number(meta&&meta.floorL||0)||0;
    var key=String(floorL||meta&&meta.messageId||'');
    if(!key||seen[key])return;
    seen[key]=1;
    var item=(ts.feedbackByFloor&&ts.feedbackByFloor[String(floorL)])||(ts.feedbackByMessage&&ts.feedbackByMessage[String(meta&&meta.messageId||'')])||null;
    if(!item)return;
    var parsed=!!item.parsed;
    var evCount=Number(item.evCount||0)||0;
    var hasChange=false;
    var pieces=[];
    /* 该楼数值与证据（聚合所有 result） */
    var vf=null,vt=null,df=null,dtt=null,evList=[];
    safeArr(item.results).forEach(function(res){
      if(cid && trim(res.charId||'') && trim(res.charId||'')!==trim(cid))return;
      if(!res)return;
      var snap=resultSnapshot(res);
      var charName=trim(res.charName||'');
      var eventType=trim(res.event&&res.event.type||'');
      var evidence=snap.evidence;
      var mood=snap.mood;
      var degradeReason=snap.degradeReason;
      var att=snap.tagChanges;
      var axis=snap.axisChanges;
      if(snap.valueFrom!=null){vf=snap.valueFrom;vt=snap.valueTo}
      if(snap.depthFrom!=null){df=snap.depthFrom;dtt=snap.depthTo}
      if(evidence&&evList.indexOf(evidence)<0)evList.push(evidence);
      if(eventType||mood||att.length||axis.length||res.leveledUp||snap.impressionChange){
        hasChange=true;
      }
