      if(res.leveledUp){
        pieces.push((charName?charName+'：':'')+'关系阶段推进了。');
      }
      if(att.length){
        pieces.push((charName?charName+'：':'')+'她对你的态度有变化，重点在'+att.join('、')+'。');
      }
      if(!att.length&&snap.impressionChange&&trim(snap.impressionChange.tag||'')){
        pieces.push((charName?charName+'：':'')+'她对你的态度继续向“'+trim(snap.impressionChange.tag||'')+'”靠近。');
      }
      if(axis.length){
        var axisNames=axis.map(function(a){return trim(a.tag||a.axis||'')}).filter(Boolean);
        if(axisNames.length)pieces.push((charName?charName+'：':'')+'她眼中的你更接近'+axisNames.join('、')+'。');
      }
      if(mood){
        pieces.push((charName?charName+'：':'')+'她这一刻带着'+mood+'。');
      }
      if(degradeReason){
        pieces.push((charName?charName+'：':'')+degradeReason);
      }
    });
    var title='',desc='',kind='idle';
    if(!parsed){
      title='结算失败';
      desc='本轮无机械化，请查看日志。';
      kind='fail';
    }else if(evCount<=0 || !hasChange){
      title='结算成功';
      desc='本轮无事件，平平淡淡才是真。';
      kind='idle';
    }else{
      title='有事件变化';
      desc=pieces.join(' ');
      kind='change';
    }
    if(onlyChanged && kind!=='change')return;
    if(modeFilter==='change' && kind!=='change')return;
    if(modeFilter==='idle' && kind!=='idle')return;
    if(modeFilter==='fail' && kind!=='fail')return;
    rows.push({floorL:floorL,title:title,desc:desc||'本轮有记录。',kind:kind,ts:Number(item.storedAt||0)||0,valueFrom:vf,valueTo:vt,depthFrom:df,depthTo:dtt,evidence:evList});
  });
  return rows;
}

function numChangeHtml(lbl,from,to){
  var f=Number(from),t=Number(to);
  if(from==null||to==null||(isNaN(f)&&isNaN(t)))return'';
  var d=t-f;var cls=d>0?'pos':(d<0?'neg':'zero');
  var dt=(d>0?'+':'')+(cls==='zero'?'±0':d);
  return"<span class='num-change'><span class='nc-lbl'>"+esc(lbl)+"</span>"+
    "<span class='nc-from'>"+esc(f)+"</span><span class='nc-arrow'>→</span>"+
    "<span class='nc-to'>"+esc(t)+"</span><span class='nc-delta "+cls+"'>"+esc(dt)+"</span></span>";
}

function feedbackRowHtml(row){
  var dotCls=row.kind==='change'?'pos':(row.kind==='fail'?'neg':'');
  /* 数值变化行：失败楼显示“无结算”，有数据楼显示从→到 */
  var numHtml='';
  if(row.kind==='fail'){
    numHtml="<div class='tl-sec'><div class='tl-sec-label'>数值变化</div><span class='num-change'><span class='nc-lbl'>关系值</span><span class='nc-from'>—</span><span class='nc-arrow'>→</span><span class='nc-to'>—</span><span class='nc-delta zero'>无结算</span></span></div>";
  }else if(row.valueFrom!=null||row.depthFrom!=null){
    var v=numChangeHtml('关系值',row.valueFrom,row.valueTo);
    var dp=numChangeHtml('深度',row.depthFrom,row.depthTo);
    if(v||dp)numHtml="<div class='tl-sec'><div class='tl-sec-label'>数值变化</div><div class='tl-nums'>"+(v?v:'')+(dp?dp:'')+"</div></div>";
  }
  /* 证据行：AI 原文（change 楼通常有） */
  var evHtml='';
  if(row.evidence&&row.evidence.length){
    evHtml="<div class='tl-sec'><div class='tl-sec-label'>触发原因（AI 原文）</div>"+
      row.evidence.map(function(e){return"<div class='rel-evidence'>"+esc(clip(e,200))+"</div>"}).join('')+
      "</div>";
  }
  return "<div class='rel-item' style='flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;gap:0'><div class='rel-item-main'>"+
    "<div class='rel-item-title'><span class='rel-dot "+dotCls+"' style='display:inline-block;margin-right:6px;vertical-align:1px'></span>"+esc(floorBadge(row.floorL))+" · "+esc(row.title)+"</div>"+
    "<div class='rel-item-desc'>"+esc(row.desc)+"</div>"+
    "<div class='rel-item-meta'>"+esc(fmt(row.ts))+"</div>"+
    "</div>"+numHtml+evHtml+"</div>";
}

function settleLogs(cs){
  return safeArr(cs&&cs.logs).filter(function(l){return l&&l.cat==='settle'}).slice(-8);
}

function trajectoryCard(cs){
  var logs=settleLogs(cs);
  if(!logs.length)return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>关系轨迹</div><div class='rel-card-text'>还没有结算记录。继续对话后，这里会出现关系值的变化线。</div></div>";
  var v=Number(cs.value||0),pts=[];
  for(var i=logs.length-1;i>=0;i--){
    var detail=logs[i].detail&&typeof logs[i].detail==='object'?logs[i].detail:{};
    var r=detail.result||{};
    var to=detail.valueTo!=null?(Number(detail.valueTo||0)||0):v;
    var from=detail.valueFrom!=null?(Number(detail.valueFrom||0)||0):(to-(Number(r.finalD||0)||0));
    pts.unshift({v:to,label:String(logs[i].summary||'').split('→')[0]||'变化'});
    v=from;
  }
  pts.unshift({v:v,label:'起点'});
  var W=310,H=104,padL=24,padR=8,padT=8,padB=16,cw=W-padL-padR,ch=H-padT-padB;
  var minV=Math.min(-10,Math.min.apply(null,pts.map(function(p){return p.v})));
  var maxV=Math.max(10,Math.max.apply(null,pts.map(function(p){return p.v})));
  var range=Math.max(1,maxV-minV);
  function x(i){return padL+(pts.length<=1?0:i/(pts.length-1)*cw)}
  function y(vv){return padT+ch-(vv-minV)/range*ch}
  var line=pts.map(function(p,i){return(i?'L':'M')+x(i).toFixed(1)+','+y(p.v).toFixed(1)}).join(' ');
  var area=line+' L'+x(pts.length-1).toFixed(1)+','+y(minV).toFixed(1)+' L'+x(0).toFixed(1)+','+y(minV).toFixed(1)+' Z';
  var dots=pts.map(function(p,i){return"<circle class='rel-traj-dot' cx='"+x(i).toFixed(1)+"' cy='"+y(p.v).toFixed(1)+"' r='3'></circle>"}).join('');
  return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-track-row'><div class='rel-card-title'>关系轨迹</div><div class='rel-item-meta'>最近 "+logs.length+" 次</div></div><div class='rel-traj-chart'><svg viewBox='0 0 "+W+" "+H+"'><line class='rel-traj-grid' x1='"+padL+"' y1='"+padT+"' x2='"+(W-padR)+"' y2='"+padT+"'></line><line class='rel-traj-zero' x1='"+padL+"' y1='"+y(0).toFixed(1)+"' x2='"+(W-padR)+"' y2='"+y(0).toFixed(1)+"'></line><line class='rel-traj-grid' x1='"+padL+"' y1='"+(H-padB)+"' x2='"+(W-padR)+"' y2='"+(H-padB)+"'></line><path class='rel-traj-area' d='"+area+"'></path><path class='rel-traj-line' d='"+line+"'></path>"+dots+"<text class='rel-traj-label' x='"+padL+"' y='"+(H-2)+"'>早</text><text class='rel-traj-label' x='"+(W-padR)+"' y='"+(H-2)+"'>近</text></svg></div></div>";
}

function recentCard(cs){
  var s=loadState();
  var rows=relFeedbackRows(s,cs&&cs.charId,true).slice(0,8);
  if(!rows.length)return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>近期变化</div><div class='rel-card-text'>暂无近期变化。</div></div>";
  return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-label'>近期变化</div><div class='rel-list'>"+rows.map(feedbackRowHtml).join('')+"</div></div>";
}

/* 近期变化详情卡：折叠条，点开看数值“从→到”+ AI原文证据 */
function recentDetailCard(s,cid,cs){
  var logs=safeArr(cs&&cs.logs).filter(function(l){return l&&['settle','stage','correction','tag','dynamic','crosslink'].indexOf(l.cat)>=0}).slice(-12).reverse();
  if(!logs.length)return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>近期变化</div><div class='rel-card-text'>暂无近期变化。继续对话后这里会出现关系记录。</div></div>";
  function catMini(cat){
    var m={settle:'relation',tag:'relation',dynamic:'dynamic',stage:'advance',crosslink:'relation',correction:'note'};
    return m[cat]||'note';
  }
  function catText(cat){
    var m={settle:'关系',tag:'心情',dynamic:'动力',stage:'升档',crosslink:'传导',correction:'修正'};
    return m[cat]||'记录';
  }
  /* 数值“从→到”行；无数据返回空串 */
  function numLine(lbl,from,to){
    var f=Number(from),t=Number(to);
    if(from==null||to==null||(isNaN(f)&&isNaN(t)))return'';
    var d=t-f;var cls=d>0?'pos':(d<0?'neg':'zero');
    var dt=(d>0?'+':'')+(cls==='zero'?'±0':d);
    return"<span class='num-change'><span class='nc-lbl'>"+esc(lbl)+"</span>"+
      "<span class='nc-from'>"+esc(f)+"</span><span class='nc-arrow'>→</span>"+
      "<span class='nc-to'>"+esc(t)+"</span><span class='nc-delta "+cls+"'>"+esc(dt)+"</span></span>";
  }
  return"<div class='rel-card' style='padding:6px 14px'><div class='rel-label' style='margin:8px 0'>近期变化</div><div class='rel-list'>"+
    logs.map(function(l,idx){
      var floor=l.turn||l.floorL||'';
      if(!floor&&l.detail&&l.detail.result&&l.detail.result.turn){floor=l.detail.result.turn}
      if(!floor&&l.devDetail&&l.devDetail.turn){floor=l.devDetail.turn}
      /* 取结算绝对值与证据：优先 detail（settle日志），其次 devDetail（processMessage日志） */
      var d=l.detail&&typeof l.detail==='object'?l.detail:{};
      var dv=l.devDetail&&typeof l.devDetail==='object'?l.devDetail:{};
      var vf=d.valueFrom!=null?d.valueFrom:(dv.valueFrom!=null?dv.valueFrom:null);
      var vt=d.valueTo!=null?d.valueTo:(dv.valueTo!=null?dv.valueTo:null);
      var df=d.depthFrom!=null?d.depthFrom:(dv.depthFrom!=null?dv.depthFrom:null);
      var dt2=d.depthTo!=null?d.depthTo:(dv.depthTo!=null?dv.depthTo:null);
      var ev=trim(d.evidence||dv.evidence||'');
      var nums=numLine('关系值',vf,vt)+(numLine('深度',df,dt2)?("<span style='margin-left:10px'>"+numLine('深度',df,dt2)+"</span>"):'');
      var stageFrom=d.stageFrom||dv.stageFrom||'',stageTo=d.stageTo||dv.stageTo||'';
      var stageLine=(stageFrom&&stageTo)?("<div class='rel-fact'>阶段 "+esc(stageFrom)+" → "+esc(stageTo)+"</div>"):'';
      var openCls=idx===0?' open':'';
      return"<div class='rc-item"+openCls+"'><div class='rc-head' data-toggle='rc'>"+
          (floor?"<div class='rc-floor'>"+esc(floor)+"L</div>":"<div class='rc-floor'>·</div>")+
          "<div class='rc-title'>"+esc(visibleLogSummary(l)||'记录')+"</div>"+
          "<span class='rc-mini "+catMini(l.cat)+"'>"+catText(l.cat)+"</span>"+
          "<span class='rc-arrow'>▶</span>"+
        "</div>"+
        "<div class='rc-body'>"+
          (stageLine||nums?(stageLine+"<div style='margin-top:4px'>"+nums+"</div>"):'')+
          (ev?"<div class='rel-evidence'><span class='ev-tag'>证据</span>"+esc(ev)+"</div>":(!nums?"<div class='rel-card-text' style='color:#B0B4BE;margin-top:2px'>此条无数值变化与证据。</div>":''))+
        "</div></div>";
    }).join('')+
  "</div></div>";
}

function milestoneCard(cs){
  var logs=safeArr(cs&&cs.logs).filter(function(l){return l&&l.cat==='stage'}).slice(-6).reverse();
  if(!logs.length)return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>里程碑</div><div class='rel-card-text'>阶段变化会在这里留下记录。</div></div>";
  return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-label'>里程碑</div><div class='rel-list'>"+logs.map(logRow).join('')+"</div></div>";
}

function logRow(l){
  var cls=l.cat==='settle'?(String(l.summary||'').indexOf('+')>=0?'pos':'neg'):'mid';
  return"<div class='rel-item'><span class='rel-dot "+cls+"'></span><div class='rel-item-main'><div class='rel-item-title'>"+esc(visibleLogSummary(l)||'记录')+"</div><div class='rel-item-meta'>"+esc(catLabel(l.cat))+" · "+esc(fmt(l.ts))+"</div></div></div>";
}

function catLabel(cat){
  var m={settle:'结算',tag:'标签',dynamic:'动力',stage:'阶段',crosslink:'传导',correction:'修正',calibration:'校准',protocol:'协议',api:'接口',system:'系统',init:'初始化'};
  return m[cat]||cat||'记录';
}

function archiveHtml(s){
  var ids=trackedIds(s),tab=s.ui.archiveTab||'status',cid=selectedCharId(s),cs=cid?getCS(cid):null,body='';
  if(!ids.length){
    body="<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>还没有追踪角色</div><div class='rel-card-text'>主角色通常会自动绑定。如果当前聊天角色尚未识别成功，你也可以先手动追加其他 NPC。</div><div class='rel-actions'><button class='rel-btn primary full' data-nav='init'>追加角色</button></div></div>";
  }else if(!cs){
    body="<div class='rel-empty'>没有找到当前角色</div>";
  }else if(tab==='recent'){
    /* 近期变化（对照预览：楼层 + 标题 + 描述 + 类别标签 + 详情） */
    body=charStrip(s)+recentDetailCard(s,cid,cs);
  }else if(tab==='profile'){
    body=charStrip(s)+profileCard(cid);
  }else if(tab==='manage'){
    body=
      charStrip(s)+
      "<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>当前角色管理</div><div class='rel-card-text'>"+esc(cs.charName||cid)+" · "+esc(cs.stage)+" · 关系值 "+esc(cs.value||0)+"</div><div class='rel-actions'><button class='rel-btn' data-act='edit-profile' data-cid='"+esc(cid)+"'>编辑画像</button><button class='rel-btn primary' data-act='gen-profile' data-cid='"+esc(cid)+"'>生成画像</button><button class='rel-btn danger' data-act='remove-char' data-cid='"+esc(cid)+"'>移除追踪</button></div></div>"+
      "<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>追加其他 NPC</div><div class='rel-card-text'>主角色已经自动绑定。这里只负责追加其他需要长期追踪的角色。</div><div class='rel-actions'><button class='rel-btn primary full' data-nav='init'>追加角色</button></div></div>";
  }else{
    /* 状态页：hero式轨道卡 + 印象 + 心情 + 画像入口 */
    body=charStrip(s)+trackCard(cs)+impressionCard(cs)+moodStrip(cs)+
      "";
  }
  return "<div class='rel-page'>"+headerSub('角色总览',s)+tabsHtml('archive',tab,[{id:'status',label:'状态'},{id:'recent',label:'近期变化'},{id:'profile',label:'画像'},{id:'manage',label:'管理'}])+"<div class='rel-main'>"+body+"</div></div>";
}

function profilePageHtml(s){
  var ids=trackedIds(s),cid=selectedCharId(s),cs=cid?getCS(cid):null;
  if(!ids.length)return"<div class='rel-page'>"+headerSub('角色画像',s)+"<div class='rel-main'><div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>还没有追踪角色</div><div class='rel-card-text'>主角色会自动绑定后出现在这里。</div></div></div></div>";
  if(!cs)return"<div class='rel-page'>"+headerSub('角色画像',s)+"<div class='rel-main'>"+charStrip(s)+"<div class='rel-empty'>没有找到当前角色</div></div></div>";
  var pf=getPF(cid)||{},labels=core().PROFILE_DIM_LABEL||{},dims=core().PROFILE_DIMS||[];
  var chips=dims.map(function(dim){return"<span class='rel-tag'>"+esc(labels[dim]||dim)+" · "+esc(pf[dim]||'普通')+"</span>"}).join('');
  var summary=trim(pf.summary||'');
  var text=summary?summary:'画像主数据是结构化维度。点击“生成画像”后，可选择来源进行扫描生成。';
  var srcInfo=pf.source==='api'?'接口生成':pf.source==='manual'?'手动编辑':'未生成';
  var genAt=pf.generatedAt?fmt(pf.generatedAt):'--';
  var body=charStrip(s)+
    "<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-track-row'><div class='rel-card-title'>"+esc(cs.charName||cid)+" 的画像</div><div class='rel-item-meta'>"+esc(srcInfo)+" · "+esc(genAt)+"</div></div><div class='rel-card-text'>"+esc(text)+"</div><div class='rel-tags' style='margin-top:10px'>"+chips+"</div><div class='rel-actions'><button class='rel-btn' data-act='edit-profile' data-cid='"+esc(cid)+"'>编辑画像</button><button class='rel-btn primary' data-act='gen-profile' data-cid='"+esc(cid)+"'>生成画像</button></div></div>";
  return"<div class='rel-page'>"+headerSub('角色画像',s)+"<div class='rel-main'>"+body+"</div></div>";
}


function initCard(title,text){
  var dims=core().PROFILE_DIMS||[];
  var labels=core().PROFILE_DIM_LABEL||{};
  var rules=core().PROFILE_RULES||{};
  var dimHtml=dims.map(function(dim){
    var vals=Object.keys(rules[dim]||{普通:1});
    return"<div class='rel-field'><div class='rel-field-label'>"+esc(labels[dim]||dim)+"</div><div class='rel-actions' style='margin-top:0'>"+vals.map(function(v){return"<button class='rel-mini-btn "+(v==='普通'?'on':'')+"' data-act='pick-dim' data-dim='"+esc(dim)+"' data-val='"+esc(v)+"'>"+esc(v)+"</button>"}).join('')+"</div></div>";
  }).join('');
  return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>"+esc(title)+"</div><div class='rel-card-text'>"+esc(text)+"</div><div class='rel-grid'><div class='rel-field'><div class='rel-field-label'>角色 ID</div><input class='rel-input' id='rel-init-id' placeholder='例如 alice'></div><div class='rel-field'><div class='rel-field-label'>显示名称</div><input class='rel-input' id='rel-init-name' placeholder='例如 艾莉丝'></div></div><div class='rel-field'><div class='rel-field-label'>别名</div><input class='rel-input' id='rel-init-aliases' placeholder='用逗号分隔'></div><div class='rel-grid'><div class='rel-field'><div class='rel-field-label'>初始关系值</div><input class='rel-input' id='rel-init-value' type='number' value='0'></div><div class='rel-field'><div class='rel-field-label'>初始深度</div><input class='rel-input' id='rel-init-depth' type='number' value='0'></div></div>"+dimHtml+"<div class='rel-actions'><button class='rel-btn primary full' data-act='init-char'>确认初始化</button></div></div>";
}

function dynamicsHtml(s){
  var tab=s.ui.dynamicTab||'timeline',cid=selectedCharId(s),cs=cid?getCS(cid):null,body='';
  if(tab==='engine')body=charStrip(s)+engineHero(cid,cs)+engineCard(cid,cs);
  else body=charStrip(s)+timelineCard(s,cid);
  return"<div class='rel-page'>"+headerSub('关系动态',s)+tabsHtml('dynamic',tab,[{id:'timeline',label:'关系动态'},{id:'engine',label:'动力事件'}])+"<div class='rel-main'>"+body+"</div></div>";
}

/* 动力 hero：展示本轮已触发的动力（done=true）。对照预览顶部绿色卡片。 */
function engineHero(cid,cs){
  var active={label:'',note:'',has:false};
  try{
    if(core().buildRelCtxObject){
      var relCtx=core().buildRelCtxObject(loadState())||{};
      var ch=safeArr(relCtx.characters).filter(function(x){return x&&x.id===cid})[0]||null;
      var arr=safeArr(ch&&ch.activeDynamics);
      if(arr.length){active.has=true;active.label=arr[0].label||arr[0].id;active.note=arr[0].prompt||'本轮提示的行为倾向'}
    }
  }catch(_){}
  if(!active.has)return'';
  return"<div class='rel-dyn-hero'><div class='dh-label'>这一轮更容易出现</div><div class='dh-title'>"+esc(active.label)+"</div><div class='dh-note'>"+esc(active.note)+"</div><div class='dh-status'>✓ 只有真的在对话里表现出来，系统才会记成已经发生</div></div>";
}

function timelineCard(s,cid){
  var filter=trim(s&&s.ui&&s.ui.pageState&&s.ui.pageState.relFilter||'all');
  var rows=relFeedbackRows(s,cid,false,filter);
  var filterBar="<div class='rel-tabs'>"
    +"<button class='rel-tab "+(filter==='all'?'on':'')+"' data-act='set-rel-filter' data-filter='all'>全部</button>"
    +"<button class='rel-tab "+(filter==='change'?'on':'')+"' data-act='set-rel-filter' data-filter='change'>仅变化</button>"
    +"<button class='rel-tab "+(filter==='idle'?'on':'')+"' data-act='set-rel-filter' data-filter='idle'>仅日常</button>"
    +"<button class='rel-tab "+(filter==='fail'?'on':'')+"' data-act='set-rel-filter' data-filter='fail'>仅失败</button>"
    +"</div>";
  if(!rows.length)return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>关系动态</div>"+filterBar+"<div class='rel-card-text'>暂无记录。</div></div>";
  return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-label'>关系动态</div>"+filterBar+"<div class='rel-list'>"+rows.map(feedbackRowHtml).join('')+"</div></div>";
}

function pendingCard(s){
  var list=safeArr(s.pending).slice().reverse();
  if(!list.length)return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>待确认事件</div><div class='rel-card-text'>当前没有需要确认的事件。</div></div>";
  return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-label'>待确认事件</div><div class='rel-list'>"+list.map(function(p){
    var lbl=core().EVENT_LABEL&&core().EVENT_LABEL[p.type]||p.type||'未知事件';
    return"<div class='rel-item'><span class='rel-dot'></span><div class='rel-item-main'><div class='rel-item-title'>"+esc(lbl)+" → "+esc(p.target||'?')+"</div><div class='rel-item-desc'>"+esc(p.evidence||p.reason||'等待确认')+"</div><div class='rel-item-meta'>"+esc(fmt(p.ts))+"</div></div></div>";
  }).join('')+"</div></div>";
}

function engineCard(cid,cs){
  if(!cid||!cs)return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-text'>先初始化角色。</div></div>";
  /* v2：展示本轮提示的动力（done=true 才生效）+ 可触发的动力清单 */
  var prompt=[];
  try{
    if(core().buildRelCtxObject){
      var relCtx=core().buildRelCtxObject(loadState())||{};
      var ch=safeArr(relCtx.characters).filter(function(x){return x&&x.id===cid})[0]||null;
      prompt=safeArr(ch&&ch.activeDynamics);
    }
  }catch(_){}
  /* 可触发清单（满足条件、可能未来提示） */
  var allDyn=safeArr(core().DYNAMICS);
  var pf=getPF(cid)||{};
  var actived=allDyn.map(function(d){
    try{
      var cs2=getCS(cid)||cs;
      if(core().pickActiveDynamics){
        var live=core().pickActiveDynamics(cs2,pf,Number(loadState().meta&&loadState().meta.round||0)||0,loadState().settings||{});
        if(live.some(function(x){return x.id===d.id}))return d;
      }
    }catch(_){}
    return null;
  }).filter(Boolean);
  return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>关系动力</div><div class='rel-card-text'>这里显示的是角色这一轮更容易流露出来的反应。只有聊天里真的出现了这些表现，系统才会把它记成已经发生；如果没出现，就只当作一闪而过的情绪，不会硬算进关系结果。</div>"
    +"<div class='rel-label' style='margin-top:12px'>这一轮更容易出现</div>"
    +"<div class='rel-list'>"+(prompt.length?prompt.map(function(d){
        var w=d.weight==='heavy'?'重量':(d.weight==='light'?'轻量':'中量');
        return"<div class='rel-dyn-item'><div class='rel-dyn-ic "+esc(d.weight)+"'>"+esc(d.weight==='heavy'?'★':(d.weight==='light'?'·':'◆'))+"</div><div class='rel-dyn-info'><div class='rel-dyn-t'>"+esc(d.label||d.id)+" · "+esc(w)+"</div><div class='rel-dyn-d'>"+esc(d.prompt||'')+"</div><div class='rel-dyn-cond'>只要这一轮真的表现出来，就会记进关系结果</div></div></div>";
      }).join(''):"<div class='rel-card-text' style='color:#8C95A6'>本轮无提示。</div>")+"</div>"
    +"<div class='rel-label' style='margin-top:12px'>后续可能出现</div>"
    +"<div class='rel-tags'>"+(actived.length?actived.map(function(d){return"<span class='rel-tag'>"+esc(d.label||d.id)+"</span>"}).join(''):"<span class='rel-tag soft'>暂无</span>")+"</div>"
    +"</div>"+recentCard(cs);
}

function correctionHtml(s){
  var tab=s.ui.correctionTab||'manual',cid=selectedCharId(s),cs=cid?getCS(cid):null,body='';
  if(tab==='rules')body=rulesCard();
  else if(tab==='history')body=correctionHistory(s,cid);
  else body=charStrip(s)+manualCorrectionCard(s,cid,cs);
  return"<div class='rel-page'>"+headerSub('修正中心',s)+tabsHtml('correction',tab,[{id:'manual',label:'手动修正'},{id:'rules',label:'准则'},{id:'history',label:'历史'}])+"<div class='rel-main'>"+body+"</div></div>";
}

function feedbackForFloor(s,floorL,msgId){
  var ts=s&&s.turnState||{};
  if(msgId&&ts.feedbackByMessage&&ts.feedbackByMessage[String(msgId)])return ts.feedbackByMessage[String(msgId)];
  if(floorL&&ts.feedbackByFloor&&ts.feedbackByFloor[String(floorL)])return ts.feedbackByFloor[String(floorL)];
  return null;
}

function feedbackSummaryCard(s,floorL,msgId){
  if(!floorL&&!msgId)return'';
  var item=feedbackForFloor(s,floorL,msgId);
  if(!item){
    return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>本楼关系反馈</div><div class='rel-card-text'>当前楼层暂无关系反馈记录。可以继续查看或手动修正。</div></div>";
  }
  var results=safeArr(item.results);
  var ok=results.filter(function(result){return result&&result.ok});
  var title=ok.length?'本楼关系反馈':'本楼没有关系变化';
  var rows='';
  if(ok.length){
    rows=ok.slice(0,5).map(function(result){
      var snap=resultSnapshot(result);
      var event=result.event||{};
      var valueDelta=snap.valueFrom!=null&&snap.valueTo!=null?(snap.valueTo-snap.valueFrom):0;
      var cls=valueDelta>0?'pos':valueDelta<0?'neg':'mid';
      var notes=[];
      if(result.leveledUp)notes.push('关系阶段推进');
      if(snap.tagChanges.length)notes.push('态度变化：'+snap.tagChanges.join('、'));
      else if(snap.impressionChange&&trim(snap.impressionChange.tag||''))notes.push('态度继续向“'+trim(snap.impressionChange.tag||'')+'”靠近');
      if(snap.axisChanges.length){
        var axisNames=snap.axisChanges.map(function(a){return trim(a.tag||a.axis||'')}).filter(Boolean);
        if(axisNames.length)notes.push('她眼中的你更接近'+axisNames.join('、'));
      }
      if(snap.mood)notes.push('她这一刻带着'+snap.mood);
      if(snap.degradeReason)notes.push(snap.degradeReason);
      var nums=numChangeHtml('关系值',snap.valueFrom,snap.valueTo);
      var depthNums=numChangeHtml('深度',snap.depthFrom,snap.depthTo);
      return"<div class='rel-item' style='flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;gap:6px'><div class='rel-item-main'><div class='rel-item-title'><span class='rel-dot "+cls+"' style='display:inline-block;margin-right:6px;vertical-align:1px'></span>"+esc(eventCn(event.type))+" → "+esc(result.charName||event.target||result.charId||'?')+"</div><div class='rel-item-desc'>"+esc(notes.join('；')||'本轮完成关系结算。')+"</div>"+(snap.evidence?"<div class='rel-item-meta'>"+esc(clip(snap.evidence,72))+"</div>":"")+"</div>"+((nums||depthNums)?"<div class='tl-nums'>"+(nums||'')+(depthNums||'')+"</div>":"")+"</div>";
    }).join('');
  }else if(item.parsed){
    rows="<div class='rel-card-text'>本轮已解析，但没有可结算的关系变化。</div>";
  }else{
    rows="<div class='rel-card-text'>本轮未解析到有效关系块。</div>";
  }
  return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>"+esc(title)+"</div><div class='rel-card-text'>楼层 "+esc(floorL||item.floorL||'--')+"</div><div class='rel-list'>"+rows+"</div></div>";
}

function manualCorrectionCard(s,cid,cs){
  if(!cid||!cs)return initCard('先添加角色','修正需要先有一个被追踪的角色。');
  var floorL=s.ui.pageState&&s.ui.pageState.floorL||'';
  var msgId=s.ui.pageState&&s.ui.pageState.messageId||'';
  var floorEvents=[];
  if(floorL){
    safeArr(cs.logs).forEach(function(l){
      if(l&&l.cat==='settle'&&l.detail){
        var lf=l.detail.floor||l.detail.floorL||'';
        if(String(lf)===String(floorL)&&l.detail.result&&l.detail.result.type){
          floorEvents.push(l.detail.result.type);
        }
      }
    });
  }
  var floorInfo=floorL?"<div class='rel-card-text'>当前楼层：<b>"+esc(floorL)+"</b>"+(floorEvents.length?" · 事件："+floorEvents.map(esc).join('、'):"")+"</div>":"";
  var activeTags=[];
  /* v2：从印象层取活跃标签（取代旧 cs.tags） */
  if(cs.impression){
    var colorMap={'信任':'#5C38E2','好感':'#1F9D61','依赖':'#E8A838','疏远':'#D64545','张力':'#8C95A6','忠诚':'#5C38E2','不信任':'#D64545'};
    Object.keys(cs.impression).forEach(function(tn){
      var imp=cs.impression[tn];
      if(imp&&Number(imp.str||0)>0){activeTags.push({key:tn,tag:imp,color:colorMap[tn]||'#5C38E2'})}
    });
  }
  var tagControls=activeTags.length?activeTags.map(function(one){
    var curVal=Number(one.tag&&one.tag.str||0)||0;
    return"<div class='corr-tag-item'><div class='corr-tag-info'><div class='corr-tag-dot' style='background:"+(one.color||'#5C38E2')+"'></div><span class='corr-tag-name'>"+esc(one.key)+"</span><span class='corr-tag-cur'>当前 "+esc(curVal)+"</span></div><div class='corr-tag-num'><button class='corr-tag-btn' data-act='adjust-tag-num' data-target='tag-"+esc(one.key)+"' data-delta='-1'>−</button><input class='corr-tag-val' id='tag-"+esc(one.key)+"' data-tag='"+esc(one.key)+"' type='number' value='"+esc(curVal)+"' min='0' max='5'><button class='corr-tag-btn' data-act='adjust-tag-num' data-target='tag-"+esc(one.key)+"' data-delta='1'>+</button></div></div>";
  }).join(''):"<div class='rel-card-text'>当前没有活跃印象标签，不显示修正项。继续对话让印象建立后再修正。</div>";
  var eventCalibHtml='';
  var uniqueEvents=[];
  floorEvents.forEach(function(e){if(uniqueEvents.indexOf(e)<0)uniqueEvents.push(e)});
  var evCnMap=typeof EVENT_CN!=='undefined'?EVENT_CN:{};
  if(uniqueEvents.length){
    eventCalibHtml="<div class='rel-label' style='margin-top:12px'>本楼事件校准</div>";
    var ac=s.autoCalibration||{};
    var eb=ac.eventBlock||{};
    uniqueEvents.forEach(function(ev){
      var blocked=eb[ev]==='block';
      var cnName=evCnMap[ev]||ev;
      eventCalibHtml+="<div class='rel-field' style='display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px'><span>"+esc(cnName)+"</span><label><input type='checkbox' class='rel-event-block' data-ev-type='"+esc(ev)+"'"+(blocked?" checked":"")+"> 后续不影响</label></div>";
    });
  }
  return feedbackSummaryCard(s,floorL,msgId)+"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>校准 "+esc(cs.charName||cid)+"</div><div class='rel-card-text'>只记录你明确给出的判断，不自动猜测你的标准。</div>"+floorInfo+
  "<div class='corr-row'><div class='corr-field'><div class='corr-field-header'><span class='corr-field-label'>关系值修正</span><span class='corr-field-range'>-100 ~ +100</span></div><div class='corr-num-input'><button class='corr-num-btn' data-act='adjust-corr-num' data-target='rel-corr-value' data-delta='-1'>−</button><input class='corr-num-value "+((Number(cs.value||0)>0)?'pos':(Number(cs.value||0)<0)?'neg':'')+"' id='rel-corr-value' type='number' value='"+esc(Number(cs.value||0)||0)+"' min='-100' max='100'><button class='corr-num-btn' data-act='adjust-corr-num' data-target='rel-corr-value' data-delta='1'>+</button></div></div><div class='corr-field'><div class='corr-field-header'><span class='corr-field-label'>深度修正</span><span class='corr-field-range'>0 ~ 100</span></div><div class='corr-num-input'><button class='corr-num-btn' data-act='adjust-corr-num' data-target='rel-corr-depth' data-delta='-1'>−</button><input class='corr-num-value' id='rel-corr-depth' type='number' value='"+esc(Number(cs.depth||0)||0)+"' min='0' max='100'><button class='corr-num-btn' data-act='adjust-corr-num' data-target='rel-corr-depth' data-delta='1'>+</button></div></div></div>"+
  "<div style='margin-top:14px'><div class='corr-field-label' style='margin-bottom:4px'>修正理由</div><textarea class='rel-textarea' id='rel-corr-reason' placeholder='例如：这只是礼貌回应，不应该推进关系。'></textarea></div>"+
  "<div class='corr-tags-section'><div class='rel-label'>印象标签修正</div><div style='font-size:11px;color:#8C95A6;margin:-4px 0 10px;font-weight:650;'>仅显示当前角色已建立的印象标签，不会凭空新增。</div>"+tagControls+"</div>"+eventCalibHtml+
  "<div class='rel-actions' style='margin-top:16px'><button class='rel-btn primary full' data-act='apply-correction' data-cid='"+esc(cid)+"'>提交修正</button></div></div>";
}

function rulesCard(){
  var txt='';
  try{txt=core().readCustomRules?core().readCustomRules():''}catch(_){}
  if(/^（在这里/.test(txt))txt='';
  return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>玩家准则</div><div class='rel-card-text'>写下你希望系统长期遵守的关系判断口径。</div><div class='rel-field'><textarea class='rel-textarea' id='rel-custom-rules' style='min-height:180px' placeholder='例如：普通礼貌不算好感提升，只有主动承担风险才算信任加深。'>"+esc(txt)+"</textarea></div><div class='rel-actions'><button class='rel-btn primary full' data-act='save-rules'>保存准则</button></div></div>";
}

function correctionHistory(s,cid){
  var cs=cid?getCS(cid):null;
  var corrections=cs?safeArr(cs.corrections).slice(-40).reverse():[];
  var settleLogs=cs?safeArr(cs.logs).filter(function(l){return l&&l.cat==='settle'}).slice(-60).reverse():[];
  var filterMode=s.ui.pageState.corrHistFilter||'all';
  var body='';
  if(filterMode==='floor'){
    if(!settleLogs.length){
      body="<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>楼层变动</div><div class='rel-card-text'>暂无结算记录。</div></div>";
    }else{
      body="<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-label'>按楼层变动</div><div class='rel-list'>"+settleLogs.map(function(l){
        var detail=l.detail&&typeof l.detail==='object'?l.detail:{};
        var d=detail.result||{};
        var floor=detail.floor||detail.floorL||'';
        var msgId=l.detail&&l.detail.msgId||'';
        var cls=String(l.summary||'').indexOf('+')>=0?'pos':'neg';
        var parts=[];
        if(floor)parts.push('楼层 '+esc(floor));
        if(detail.valueFrom!=null&&detail.valueTo!=null)parts.push('关系值 '+esc(detail.valueFrom)+'→'+esc(detail.valueTo));
        else if(d.finalD)parts.push('Δ值 '+esc(d.finalD));
        if(detail.depthFrom!=null&&detail.depthTo!=null)parts.push('深度 '+esc(detail.depthFrom)+'→'+esc(detail.depthTo));
        else if(d.depthD)parts.push('Δ深 '+esc(d.depthD));
        return"<div class='rel-item'><span class='rel-dot "+cls+"'></span><div class='rel-item-main'><div class='rel-item-title'>"+esc(visibleLogSummary(l)||'变动')+"</div><div class='rel-item-desc'>"+parts.join(' ')+"</div><div class='rel-item-meta'>"+esc(fmt(l.ts))+"</div></div></div>";
      }).join('')+"</div></div>";
    }
  }else if(filterMode==='changes'){
    var changed=corrections.filter(function(c){
      var before=c.before||{},after=c.after||{};
      return before.value!==after.value||before.depth!==after.depth||c.tagChanges||c.after&&c.after.tags;
    });
    body="<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-label'>有变化的修正</div>"+(changed.length?"<div class='rel-list'>"+changed.map(function(c){
      var before=c.before||{},after=c.after||{},desc=[];
      if(before.value!==after.value&&after.value!=null)desc.push('关系值设为 '+after.value);
      if(before.depth!==after.depth&&after.depth!=null)desc.push('深度设为 '+after.depth);
      return"<div class='rel-item'><span class='rel-dot'></span><div class='rel-item-main'><div class='rel-item-title'>"+esc(c.reason||'手动修正')+"</div><div class='rel-item-desc'>"+esc(desc.join(' · ')||'标签已调整')+"</div><div class='rel-item-meta'>"+esc(fmt(c.ts))+"</div></div></div>";
    }).join('')+"</div>":"<div class='rel-card-text'>暂无有变化的修正。</div>")+"</div>";
  }else{
    if(!corrections.length){
      body="<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>修正历史</div><div class='rel-card-text'>暂无修正记录。</div></div>";
    }else{
      body="<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-label'>修正历史</div><div class='rel-list'>"+corrections.map(function(c){
        return"<div class='rel-item'><span class='rel-dot'></span><div class='rel-item-main'><div class='rel-item-title'>"+esc(c.reason||'手动修正')+"</div><div class='rel-item-meta'>"+esc(fmt(c.ts))+"</div></div></div>";
      }).join('')+"</div></div>";
    }
  }
  var filterBtns="<div class='rel-actions' style='margin-bottom:8px'>"+
    "<button class='rel-btn "+(filterMode==='all'?'primary':'')+"' data-act='corr-filter' data-filter='all'>全部</button>"+
    "<button class='rel-btn "+(filterMode==='floor'?'primary':'')+"' data-act='corr-filter' data-filter='floor'>按楼层</button>"+
    "<button class='rel-btn "+(filterMode==='changes'?'primary':'')+"' data-act='corr-filter' data-filter='changes'>有变化</button></div>";
  var jumpInput="<div style='margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center'><input class='rel-input' id='rel-jump-floor' type='number' placeholder='楼层号' style='width:100px'><button class='rel-btn' data-act='jump-floor-correction'>跳转</button></div>";
  return charStrip(s)+filterBtns+jumpInput+body;
}

function settingsHtml(s){
  var tab=s.ui.settingsTab||'system',body='';
  if(tab==='data')body=dataSettingsHtml(s);
  else if(tab==='logs')body=logsSettingsHtml(s);
  else body=systemSettingsHtml(s);
  return"<div class='rel-page'>"+headerSub('设置',s)+tabsHtml('settings',tab,[{id:'system',label:'系统'},{id:'data',label:'数据'},{id:'logs',label:'日志'}])+"<div class='rel-main'>"+body+"</div></div>";
}

function systemSettingsHtml(s){
  s=s||loadState();
  s.settings=s.settings||{};
  var maxTracked=esc(s.settings.maxTracked||5);

  return "<div class='rel-card'>"+
    "<div class='rel-setting-row'>"+
      "<div><div class='rel-card-title'>启用关系系统</div><div class='rel-card-text'>关闭后不再结算关系变化。</div></div>"+
      "<button class='rel-switch "+(s.settings.enabled!==false?'on':'')+"' data-act='toggle-setting' data-key='enabled'></button>"+
    "</div>"+

    "<div class='rel-setting-row'>"+
      "<div><div class='rel-card-title'>自动结算</div><div class='rel-card-text'>读取 AI 输出的关系系统块并写入状态。</div></div>"+
      "<button class='rel-switch "+(s.settings.autoSettle!==false?'on':'')+"' data-act='toggle-setting' data-key='autoSettle'></button>"+
    "</div>"+

    "<div class='rel-setting-row'>"+
      "<div><div class='rel-card-title'>楼层反馈卡</div><div class='rel-card-text'>在对话楼层显示关系变化提示。</div></div>"+
      "<button class='rel-switch "+(s.settings.showFeedback!==false?'on':'')+"' data-act='toggle-setting' data-key='showFeedback'></button>"+
    "</div>"+

    "<div class='rel-setting-row'>"+
      "<div><div class='rel-card-title'>清理机器块</div><div class='rel-card-text'>结算后从玩家可见正文里移除关系数据块。</div></div>"+
      "<button class='rel-switch "+(s.settings.cleanMachineBlock!==false?'on':'')+"' data-act='toggle-setting' data-key='cleanMachineBlock'></button>"+
    "</div>"+

    "<div class='rel-setting-row'>"+
      "<div><div class='rel-card-title'>动力事件高亮</div><div class='rel-card-text'>触发行为倾向时弹出提示。</div></div>"+
      "<button class='rel-switch "+(s.settings.showDynamicHighlight!==false?'on':'')+"' data-act='toggle-setting' data-key='showDynamicHighlight'></button>"+
    "</div>"+

    "<div class='rel-field'>"+
      "<div class='rel-field-label'>最多追踪角色</div>"+
      "<input class='rel-input' id='rel-max-tracked' type='number' min='1' max='5' value='"+maxTracked+"'>"+
    "</div>"+

    "<div class='rel-label' style='margin-top:14px'>关系参数（三层模型）</div>"+
    "<div class='corr-row'>"+
      "<div class='rel-field'><div class='rel-field-label'>印象推进冷却（轮）</div><input class='rel-input' type='number' min='0' max='9' id='rel-imp-cooldown' value='"+esc(s.settings.impressionCooldown!=null?s.settings.impressionCooldown:2)+"'></div>"+
      "<div class='rel-field'><div class='rel-field-label'>升档等待（轮）</div><input class='rel-input' type='number' min='1' max='9' id='rel-pending-decay' value='"+esc(s.settings.pendingDecayRounds!=null?s.settings.pendingDecayRounds:3)+"'></div>"+
    "</div>"+
    "<div class='corr-row'>"+
      "<div class='rel-field'><div class='rel-field-label'>心情持续（轮）</div><input class='rel-input' type='number' min='1' max='9' id='rel-mood-life' value='"+esc(s.settings.moodMaxLife!=null?s.settings.moodMaxLife:3)+"'></div>"+
      "<div class='rel-field'><div class='rel-field-label'>连续提醒阈值</div><input class='rel-input' type='number' min='1' max='9' id='rel-streak-thresh' value='"+esc(s.settings.streakWarnThreshold!=null?s.settings.streakWarnThreshold:2)+"'></div>"+
    "</div>"+
    "<div class='rel-setting-row'>"+
      "<div><div class='rel-card-title'>深度只随节点/升档推进</div><div class='rel-card-text'>关闭则 depth 按旧逻辑更快增长。</div></div>"+
      "<button class='rel-switch "+(s.settings.depthNodeOnly!==false?'on':'')+"' data-act='toggle-setting' data-key='depthNodeOnly'></button>"+
    "</div>"+

    "<div class='rel-actions'>"+
      "<button class='rel-btn primary full' data-act='save-system-settings'>保存设置</button>"+
    "</div>"+
  "</div>";
}


function dataSettingsHtml(s){
  return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>数据管理</div><div class='rel-card-text'>"+trackedIds(s).length+" 位角色 · "+safeArr(s.logs).length+" 条系统记录。数据保存在当前聊天中。</div><div class='rel-actions'><button class='rel-btn primary' data-act='export-data'>导出数据</button><button class='rel-btn' data-act='wb-init'>初始化/同步世界书</button></div><div class='rel-actions'><button class='rel-btn danger full' data-act='clear-data'>清空关系数据</button></div></div>";
}

function logsSettingsHtml(s){
  var list=safeArr(s.logs).slice(-80).reverse();
  if(!list.length)return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>技术日志</div><div class='rel-card-text'>暂无日志。</div><div class='rel-card-text'>需要排查问题时，再导出日志给协作者看就够了。</div><div class='rel-actions'><button class='rel-btn' data-act='export-logs'>导出日志</button></div></div>";
  return"<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-label'>技术日志</div><div class='rel-card-text'>这里只保留排查问题要用的日志。</div><div class='rel-list'>"+list.map(logRow).join('')+"</div><div class='rel-actions'><button class='rel-btn' data-act='export-logs'>导出日志</button></div></div>";
}

var EVENT_CN={
  affection_gain:'好感提升',affection_loss:'好感下降',trust_gain:'信任提升',trust_loss:'信任下降',
  conflict:'冲突',reconciliation:'和解',betrayal:'背叛',forgiveness:'原谅',
  sacrifice:'牺牲',support:'支持',rejection:'拒绝',acceptance:'接纳',
  jealousy:'嫉妒',gratitude:'感恩',disappointment:'失望',admiration:'钦佩',
  confession:'表白',misunderstanding:'误解',cooperation:'合作',competition:'竞争',
  dependence:'依赖',independence:'独立',intimacy:'亲密',distance:'疏远',
  promise:'承诺',breach:'违约',reunion:'重逢',farewell:'告别',
  revelation:'揭示',deception:'欺骗',growth:'成长',regression:'退步'
};

function eventCn(type){return core().EVENT_LABEL&&core().EVENT_LABEL[type]||EVENT_CN[type]||catLabel(type)||type||'未知'}

function logRowCn(l){
  var cls=l.cat==='settle'?(String(l.summary||'').indexOf('+')>=0?'pos':'neg'):'mid';
  var sum=visibleLogSummary(l);
  Object.keys(EVENT_CN).forEach(function(k){if(sum.indexOf(k)>=0)sum=sum.replace(new RegExp(k.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g,'\\$&'),'g'),EVENT_CN[k])});
  return"<div class='rel-item'><span class='rel-dot "+cls+"'></span><div class='rel-item-main'><div class='rel-item-title'>"+esc(sum||'记录')+"</div><div class='rel-item-meta'>"+esc(catLabel(l.cat))+" · "+esc(fmt(l.ts))+"</div></div></div>";
}

function logsPageHtml(s){
  var allLogs=safeArr(s.logs);
  s.uiUnread=s.uiUnread||{};
  s.uiUnread.logsReadAt=now();
  saveState(s);
  var charLogs=[];
  trackedIds(s).forEach(function(cid){
    var cs=getCS(cid)||{};
    safeArr(cs.logs).forEach(function(l){var x=Object.assign({},l);x.charName=cs.charName||cid;charLogs.push(x)});
  });
  var merged=allLogs.concat(charLogs).sort(function(a,b){return(Number(b.ts)||0)-(Number(a.ts)||0)}).slice(0,120);
  var body='';
  if(!merged.length){
    body="<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>日志</div><div class='rel-card-text'>暂无日志记录。</div></div>";
  }else{
    body="<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-label'>全部日志（"+merged.length+"条）</div><div class='rel-list'>"+merged.map(logRowCn).join('')+"</div></div>";
  }
  body+="<div class='rel-actions'><button class='rel-btn' data-act='export-logs'>导出日志</button></div>";
  return"<div class='rel-page'>"+headerSub('日志',s)+"<div class='rel-main'>"+body+"</div></div>";
}

function openLogsOverlay(){
  var s=loadState();
  s.uiUnread=s.uiUnread||{};
  s.uiUnread.logsReadAt=now();
  saveState(s);
  var logs=safeArr(s.logs).slice(-60).reverse();
  var body=logs.length?logs.map(function(x){
    var msg=String(visibleLogSummary(x)||x.text||'');
    if(x.detail)msg+=' ｜ '+String(x.detail||'');
    return"<div class='rel-item'><span class='rel-dot "+(x.status==='err'?'neg':'mid')+"'></span><div class='rel-item-main'><div class='rel-item-title'>"+esc(msg)+"</div><div class='rel-item-meta'>"+esc(fmt(x.ts||x.time))+" · "+esc(x.status==='running'?'运行中':x.status==='err'?'错误':'完成')+"</div></div></div>";
  }).join(''):"<div class='rel-card-text'>暂无日志</div>";
  base().openOverlay&&base().openOverlay('运行日志','最近 60 条',"<div class='rel-card' style='margin:0;border:none;box-shadow:none;padding:0'>"+body+"</div>");
  renderAll(true);
}

function helpBodyHtml(s){
  var tab=(s.ui&&s.ui.helpTab)||'start';

  function pane(id,html){
    return"<div class='rel-guide-group "+(tab===id?'active':'')+"' id='rel-help-tab-"+id+"'>"+html+"</div>";
  }
  function hero(t,b){
    return"<div class='rel-guide-hero'><div class='rel-guide-hero-title'>"+t+"</div><div class='rel-guide-hero-text'>"+b+"</div></div>";
  }
  function card(i,t,b,extra,soft){
    return"<div class='rel-guide-card "+(soft?'soft':'')+"'><div class='rel-guide-title'><div class='rel-guide-icon'>"+i+"</div>"+t+"</div><div class='rel-guide-text'>"+b+"</div>"+(extra||'')+"</div>";
  }
  function flow(list){
    return"<div class='rel-guide-flow'>"+list.map(function(x){return"<div class='rel-guide-step'><div class='rel-guide-step-dot'></div><div>"+x+"</div></div>"}).join('')+"</div>";
  }
  function pills(list){
    return"<div style='margin-top:10px'>"+list.map(function(x){return"<span class='rel-guide-pill'>"+x+"</span>"}).join('')+"</div>";
  }
  function mini(list){
    return"<div class='rel-guide-mini-list'>"+list.map(function(x){return"<div class='rel-guide-mini-item'><div class='rel-guide-mini-item-title'>"+x[0]+"</div><div class='rel-guide-mini-item-text'>"+x[1]+"</div></div>"}).join('')+"</div>";
  }
  function note(t){
    return"<div class='rel-guide-box'>"+t+"</div>";
  }

  return(
    "<div class='rel-guide-tabs'>"+
      "<div class='rel-guide-tab "+(tab==='start'?'active':'')+"' data-act='help-tab' data-help-tab='start'>先看这个</div>"+
      "<div class='rel-guide-tab "+(tab==='ui'?'active':'')+"' data-act='help-tab' data-help-tab='ui'>界面与设置</div>"+
      "<div class='rel-guide-tab "+(tab==='engine'?'active':'')+"' data-act='help-tab' data-help-tab='engine'>机制怎么运作</div>"+
      "<div class='rel-guide-tab "+(tab==='qa'?'active':'')+"' data-act='help-tab' data-help-tab='qa'>日常问题</div>"+
    "</div>"+
    "<div style='padding-top:16px'>"+

    pane('start',
      hero('先记住一句话就够了',
        '关系系统会跟着聊天悄悄记录你和每一个角色关系的变化。你只需要像平时一样正常聊，系统在后台自动结算，不用专门去操作它。')+
      card('🚀','第一次怎么开始',
        '主角色会在首次导入聊天后<strong>自动绑定</strong>，不需要你手动初始化。如果你还想长期追踪其他 NPC（朋友、对手、配角），再去「角色总览」里追加。',
        flow([
          '正常聊一次，等出现第一条模型回复，主角色自动绑定',
          '想追踪别的角色，进入角色总览 → 追加角色',
          '之后正常聊天，系统在后台按楼层结算关系变化',
          '你想看的时候，回首页查看状态、近期变化与动力事件'
        ]))+
      card('🧭','你最常去的地方','先知道这四个入口就够用了。',pills(['角色总览：状态、近期变化、画像','关系动态：时间线与动力事件','修正中心：手动校准与准则','设置：开关与参数']),true)+
      card('🔒','什么时候会调用接口',
        '打开首页、看帮助、看关系动态，都<strong>不会</strong>自动调用模型。只有你主动确认「生成画像」「重新结算某个楼层」时才会请求接口。',
        note('如果你只是想先看看界面，可以放心打开帮助和各个页面。真正要动接口之前，都会先弹确认。'),true)
    )+

    pane('ui',
      hero('界面与设置','这里解释界面上你能动手的几样东西：怎么追加角色、怎么设初始数值、以及日常会看到的那些标签。')+
      card('👥','(a) 多角色怎么追加',
        '主角色自动绑定，这里只负责<strong>追加其他 NPC</strong>。进入角色总览 → 追加角色，填好信息后确认初始化。',
        flow([
          '角色 ID：英文短标识，例如 alice',
          '显示名称：界面上展示的名字，例如 艾莉丝',
          '别名：用逗号分隔，帮助系统认出这是谁',
          '填好初始数值和画像档位后，点确认初始化'
        ]))+
      card('🎚️','(b) 怎么设每个角色的初始阶段数值',
        '初始化时可以填两样数值，外加一组画像档位：',
        mini([
          ['初始关系值','-100 到 +100，正数偏好感、负数偏疏远，0 是中性'],
          ['初始深度','0 到 100，表示这段关系的厚度，越深越不容易被一次事件推翻'],
          ['阶段不能直接设','初见→相识→熟悉→牵连→深涉→核心 这 6 个阶段，是由关系值与积累自动决定的，不在初始化里手填']
        ]))+
      card('🌤️','(c) 日常参数与标签','日常聊天里，界面上会出现这几类标签，它们都是系统自动生成的：',
        mini([
          ['态度标签','她对你的整体态度，比如基础好感、本能戒备'],
          ['她眼中的你','把你固定成哪一类人，是定位不是情绪'],
          ['心情标签','她这一刻的状态，带强度和持续轮数，会随轮数自然衰减']
        ]),true)+
      card('⚙️','关键设置说人话','设置页里最常用的几个开关：',
        mini([
          ['自动结算','关闭后系统不再自动读取关系变化'],
          ['楼层反馈卡','在对话楼层上显示这一轮的关系变化提示'],
          ['清理机器块','把结算用的内部数据块从你能看到的正文里移除'],
          ['冷却轮数','控制印象推进和升档等待的节奏，默认值通常不用改']
        ]))
    )+

    pane('engine',
      hero('机制怎么运作','关系系统不只看一句好话或一次冲突。它把关系分成三个层面，再加上阶段边界，来判断到底算不算真的变了。')+
      card('👀','三层关系是什么',
        '每段关系同时由三样东西描述：<strong>关系值</strong>是正负好感、<strong>阶段</strong>是初见到核心 6 档、<strong>深度</strong>是关系厚度。三者一起决定这段关系现在处在什么位置。')+
      card('🚧','阶段为什么是硬边界',
        '低阶段<strong>不会发生</strong>忠诚宣誓、秘密揭露、依赖加深这类深度事件——因为在初见阶段，双方客观上还没有可被背叛的忠诚、可被揭露的秘密。系统会把这些提前拦下或降级。')+
      card('🌀','为什么很多轮“没有变化”是正常的',
        '普通寒暄、礼貌照顾、重复已有的态度，都<strong>不算关系变化</strong>。只有真正突破对方当前印象的事才会被记下来。所以日常聊天里，很多轮本来就该是空事件，这不是出问题。')+
      card('🎭','瞬时情绪 ≠ 长期关系',
        '这一轮对方开心或生气，是<strong>瞬时情绪</strong>，不一定代表长期关系变了。心情标签会记录瞬时状态并自然衰减，只有印象层级的突破才会真正推进关系数值。',
        note('换句话说：一次冷淡的回复不会立刻扣关系值，一次客套也不会立刻加。看的是趋势，不是某一轮。'),true)+
      card('🧬','画像的作用',
        '角色画像不只是展示，它是关系变化的<strong>难度参数和演绎风格来源</strong>。画像不同，同样的互动推进关系的快慢也会不同。可以生成，也可以手动编辑。')
    )+

    pane('qa',
      hero('日常问题','这里收集最常被问到的几个疑问，以及遇到不对劲时该去哪里看。')+
      card('❓','聊了很多却“没有变化”记录？',
        '通常正常。寒暄和重复态度不算突破，系统会如实记成空事件。等出现真正改变印象的互动，变化记录自然就出现了。')+
      card('❓','阶段一直升不上去？',
        '升档需要<strong>多次同方向的积累</strong>加上一次突破性事件，单次强烈互动（一次大吵或一次感动）通常不够。可以继续聊，让印象先沉淀。')+
      card('❓','动力提示了却没生效？',
        '动力（行为倾向）只是告诉 AI 这轮更容易出现某种反应。只有 AI 真的在对话里演出来、并回传确认，系统才会记成已经发生。没演出来就只当作一闪而过的情绪。')+
      card('🛠️','觉得系统的判断不准？',
        '去<strong>修正中心</strong>，可以手动校准某个角色的关系值、深度和印象标签；也可以写一段<strong>玩家准则</strong>，把你的判断口径长期固定下来，比如“普通礼貌不算好感提升”。',true)+
      card('⏪','删消息回档了怎么办？',
        '如果删消息回退到了更早楼层，覆盖到回档点之后的关系记录可能已经失效。建议去修正中心校准，或重新结算相关楼层的区间。')+
      card('💡','锦上添花的建议',
        '写一段玩家准则给系统定调子、定期检查画像是否需要重新生成、关注关系动态里的动力事件提示。这些都不强制，但能让关系演得更贴合你的预期。',true)
    )+

    "</div>"
  );
}

async function openHelpOverlay(state){
  var s=state||loadState();s.ui=s.ui||{};s.ui.helpSeen=true;s.ui.helpTab=s.ui.helpTab||'start';saveState(s);
  base().openOverlay&&base().openOverlay('帮助与上手说明','第五季果汁',helpBodyHtml(s));
  renderAll(true);
}

function initPageHtml(s){
  var mainId=trim(s&&s.roster&&s.roster.mainCharId||'')||firstCharId(s);
  var mainCs=mainId?getCS(mainId):null;

  var topCard=mainCs
    ?("<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>当前主角色已自动绑定</div><div class='rel-card-text'>"+esc(mainCs.charName||mainId)+" · "+esc(mainCs.stage||'初见')+" · 关系值 "+esc(mainCs.value||0)+"。这里不再负责主角色初始化，只用于追加其他 NPC。</div></div>")
    :("<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>追加追踪角色</div><div class='rel-card-text'>如果你想追踪其他 NPC，可以在这里手动添加。主角色通常会由系统自动绑定。</div></div>");

  return "<div class='rel-page'>"+headerSub('追加角色',s)+"<div class='rel-main'>"+
    topCard+
    initCard('追加追踪角色','填写其他 NPC 的基本信息后加入追踪。系统不会把这里当成主角色初始化入口。')+
  "</div></div>";
}


function renderPage(s){
  var page=s.ui.page||'home';
  if(page==='init')return initPageHtml(s);
  if(page==='archive')return archiveHtml(s);
  if(page==='dynamics')return dynamicsHtml(s);
  if(page==='correction')return correctionHtml(s);
  if(page==='logs')return logsPageHtml(s);
  if(page==='settings')return settingsHtml(s);
  return homeHtml(s);
}

function ensureEntryPage(){
  var s=loadState();
  if(!s.ui||!s.ui.page)s.ui.page='home';
  saveState(s);
  renderAll(true);
}


function _renderAll(force){
  ensurePageStyle();
  if(!app.core||!app.base)return;
  var root=base().ensureRoot?base().ensureRoot():q('#'+ROOT_ID);
  var opened=!!(root&&root.classList&&root.classList.contains('open'));
  if(!force&&!opened)return;
  if(base().isEditingNow&&base().isEditingNow()&&!force)return;
  var el=q('#rel-app',root);if(!el)return;
  var s=loadState();
  app.state=s;
  el.innerHTML=renderPage(s);
  bindTextEditors(el);
}

function renderAll(force){try{_renderAll(force)}catch(e){console.warn('[关系界面渲染]',e);toast('关系界面渲染失败')}}

function bindTextEditors(root){
  qa('input,textarea,select',root).forEach(function(el){
    if(el.getAttribute('data-rel-edit-bound')==='1')return;
    el.setAttribute('data-rel-edit-bound','1');
    function mark(on){app._editing=!!on;app._editingUntil=now()+(on?1800:500)}
    ['focus','focusin','pointerdown','mousedown','touchstart','beforeinput','input','keydown','keypress','keyup','compositionstart','compositionupdate','paste','cut','change'].forEach(function(ev){
      el.addEventListener(ev,function(e){mark(true);e.stopPropagation()},true);
    });
    ['blur','focusout','compositionend'].forEach(function(ev){
      el.addEventListener(ev,function(e){mark(false);e.stopPropagation()},true);
    });
    ['pointerup','touchmove','touchend','mouseup','click','dblclick','contextmenu'].forEach(function(ev){
      el.addEventListener(ev,function(e){e.stopPropagation()},true);
    });
    el.style.webkitUserSelect='text';
    el.style.userSelect='text';
    el.setAttribute('autocomplete','off');
    el.setAttribute('autocorrect','off');
    el.setAttribute('spellcheck','false');
  });
}

function startAction(a){_actBusy=true;_actBusyAt=now();_actBusyAction=a||''}
function endAction(){_actBusy=false;_actBusyAt=0;_actBusyAction=''}

function bind(){
  var root=base().ensureRoot?base().ensureRoot():q('#'+ROOT_ID);
  var UI_BIND_VER='20260612-relation-preview-r1';
  if(!root||root.getAttribute('data-ui-bound')===UI_BIND_VER)return;
  root.setAttribute('data-ui-bound',UI_BIND_VER);root.removeAttribute('data-rel-ui-bound');
  root.addEventListener('click',function(e){
    /* rc 折叠：点击 rc-head 切换展开（不进入按钮动作流程） */
    var tg=e.target&&e.target.closest?e.target.closest('[data-toggle="rc"]'):null;
    if(tg){
      var item=tg.parentNode;
      if(item&&item.classList)item.classList.toggle('open');
      e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();
      return;
    }
    if(!(e.target&&e.target.closest&&e.target.closest('.rel-char-switcher')))closeCharMenus(root);
    var n=e.target&&e.target.closest?e.target.closest('[data-act],[data-nav],[data-archive-tab],[data-dynamic-tab],[data-correction-tab],[data-settings-tab]'):null;
    if(!n)return;
    e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();
    if(_actBusy&&now()-_actBusyAt<1200){toast('正在处理');return}
    var action='';
    if(n.hasAttribute('data-act'))action=n.getAttribute('data-act');
    else if(n.hasAttribute('data-nav'))action='nav';
    else if(n.hasAttribute('data-archive-tab'))action='archive-tab';
    else if(n.hasAttribute('data-dynamic-tab'))action='dynamic-tab';
    else if(n.hasAttribute('data-correction-tab'))action='correction-tab';
    else if(n.hasAttribute('data-settings-tab'))action='settings-tab';
    startAction(action);
    Promise.resolve(act(action,n)).catch(function(err){console.warn('[关系界面动作]',err);toast('操作失败')}).then(endAction,endAction);
  },true);
  root.addEventListener('input',function(e){
    var t=e.target;if(!t)return;
    if(t.id==='rel-corr-value')t.className='corr-num-value '+((Number(t.value)||0)>0?'pos':(Number(t.value)||0)<0?'neg':'');
    if(t.id==='rel-init-aliases'){
      var s=loadState();
      writeInitDraft(s,{aliases:trim(t.value||'').split(/[,，、]/).map(trim).filter(Boolean)});
      saveState(s);
    }
  },true);
}

async function act(action,node){
  var s=loadState();
  if(action==='toggle-char-menu'){
    var sw=node&&node.closest?node.closest('.rel-char-switcher'):null;
    if(!sw)return;
    var dd=q('.rel-char-dropdown',sw),trigger=q('.rel-char-trigger',sw);
    var opening=!!(dd&&!dd.classList.contains('show'));
    closeCharMenus(uiRoot(),opening?sw:null);
    if(dd)dd.classList.toggle('show',opening);
    if(trigger)trigger.classList.toggle('open',opening);
    return;
  }
  if(action==='select-char'){
    var cid=node.getAttribute('data-cid')||'';
    closeCharMenus(uiRoot());
    s.ui.focusCharId=cid;
    s.ui.pageState.charId=cid;
    saveState(s);
    return renderAll(true);
  }
  if(action==='go-logs')return openLogsOverlay();
  if(action==='open-help')return openHelpOverlay(s);
  if(action==='help-tab'){s.ui.helpTab=node.getAttribute('data-help-tab')||'start';s.ui.helpSeen=true;saveState(s);return openHelpOverlay(s)}
  if(action==='adjust-corr-num'){
    var target=q('#'+(node.getAttribute('data-target')||''),uiRoot());
    if(target){
      var v=Number(target.value||0)||0,delta=Number(node.getAttribute('data-delta')||0)||0;
      var min=Number(target.min||-999999),max=Number(target.max||999999);
      v=Math.max(min,Math.min(max,v+delta));
      target.value=String(v);
      if(target.id==='rel-corr-value')target.className='corr-num-value '+(v>0?'pos':v<0?'neg':'');
    }
    return;
  }
  if(action==='adjust-tag-num'){
    var inp=q('#'+(node.getAttribute('data-target')||''),uiRoot());
    if(inp){
      var tv=Number(inp.value||0)||0,td=Number(node.getAttribute('data-delta')||0)||0;
      var tmin=Number(inp.min||0),tmax=Number(inp.max||5);
      inp.value=String(Math.max(tmin,Math.min(tmax,tv+td)));
    }
    return;
  }
  if(action==='nav'){
    var page=node.getAttribute('data-nav')||'home';
    var patch={};
    if(node.getAttribute('data-tab'))patch.tab=node.getAttribute('data-tab');
    return nav(page,patch);
  }
  if(action==='back')return backPage(s);
  if(action==='close-page')return closePage(s);
  if(action==='home')return homePage(s);
  if(action==='archive-tab'){s.ui.archiveTab=node.getAttribute('data-archive-tab')||'status';saveState(s);return renderAll(true)}
  if(action==='dynamic-tab'){s.ui.dynamicTab=node.getAttribute('data-dynamic-tab')||'timeline';saveState(s);return renderAll(true)}
  if(action==='correction-tab'){s.ui.correctionTab=node.getAttribute('data-correction-tab')||'manual';saveState(s);return renderAll(true)}
  if(action==='settings-tab'){s.ui.settingsTab=node.getAttribute('data-settings-tab')||'system';saveState(s);return renderAll(true)}
  if(action==='focus-char'){s.ui.focusCharId=node.getAttribute('data-cid')||'';s.ui.pageState.charId=s.ui.focusCharId;saveState(s);return renderAll(true)}
  if(action==='pick-dim'){pickDim(node);return}
  if(action==='pick-preset'){pickPreset(node);return}
  if(action==='toggle-advanced'){toggleAdvanced();return}
  if(action==='init-char')return initCharAction(s);
  if(action==='remove-char')return removeCharAction(s,node.getAttribute('data-cid')||'');
  if(action==='apply-correction')return correctionAction(node.getAttribute('data-cid')||selectedCharId(s));
  if(action==='save-rules')return saveRulesAction();
  if(action==='toggle-setting')return toggleSettingAction(s,node.getAttribute('data-key')||'');
  if(action==='save-system-settings')return saveSystemSettingsAction(s);
  if(action==='export-data')return exportDataAction(s);
  if(action==='export-logs')return exportLogsAction(s);
  if(action==='wb-init')return wbInitAction(s);
  if(action==='clear-data')return clearDataAction(s);
  if(action==='edit-profile')return openProfileEditor(node.getAttribute('data-cid')||selectedCharId(s));
  if(action==='save-profile')return saveProfileAction(node.getAttribute('data-cid')||selectedCharId(s));
  if(action==='gen-profile')return genProfileAction(node.getAttribute('data-cid')||selectedCharId(s));
  if(action==='corr-filter'){s.ui.pageState.corrHistFilter=node.getAttribute('data-filter')||'all';saveState(s);return renderAll(true)}
  if(action==='jump-floor-correction'){var fl=Number((q('#rel-jump-floor')||{}).value||0)||0;if(fl>0){s.ui.correctionTab='manual';s.ui.pageState.floorL=fl;saveState(s);return renderAll(true)}else{toast('请输入有效楼层号');return}}
  if(action==='run-profile-gen'||action==='confirm-gen-profile')return confirmGenProfileAction();
}

function pickDim(node){
  var dim=node.getAttribute('data-dim')||'';
  var box=node.parentElement;if(!box)return;
  qa('[data-dim="'+dim+'"]',box).forEach(function(n){n.classList.remove('on')});
  node.classList.add('on');
  if(node.closest&&node.closest('.rel-overlay'))return;
  var s=loadState();
  var draft=readInitDraftFromState(s);
  var dims=Object.assign({},draft.dims||{});
  dims[dim]=node.getAttribute('data-val')||'';
  writeInitDraft(s,{dims:dims});
  saveState(s);
}

function pickPreset(node){
  var pn=node.getAttribute('data-preset')||'通用';
  var presets=core().PROFILE_PRESETS||{};
  var preset=presets[pn];
  /* 高亮选中按钮 */
  qa('[data-act="pick-preset"]',q('#rel-app',uiRoot())).forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('on')});
  node.classList.add('on');
  /* 更新摘要 */
  var sumEl=q('#rel-preset-summary',uiRoot());
  if(sumEl&&preset)sumEl.textContent=preset.summary||'';
  var s=loadState();
  var dims=preset&&preset.dims&&typeof preset.dims==='object'?Object.assign({},preset.dims):{};
  writeInitDraft(s,{presetName:pn,dims:dims});
  saveState(s);
  qa('.rel-mini-btn[data-dim]',q('#rel-app',uiRoot())).forEach(function(btn){
    var dim=btn.getAttribute('data-dim')||'';
    var val=btn.getAttribute('data-val')||'';
    if(dims[dim]===val)btn.classList.add('on');
    else btn.classList.remove('on');
  });
}

function toggleAdvanced(){
  var panel=q('#rel-advanced-panel',uiRoot());
  if(!panel)return;
  var open=panel.style.display==='none';
  panel.style.display=open?'':'none';
  var s=loadState();
  writeInitDraft(s,{advancedOpen:open});
  saveState(s);
}

async function initCharAction(s){
  var id=trim((q('#rel-init-id')||{}).value||'');
  var name=trim((q('#rel-init-name')||{}).value||'');
  if(!name){toast('请输入角色名称');return}

  if(!id){
    id='npc_'+(core().hashSmall?core().hashSmall(name+'|'+now()):String(now()));
  }

  var aliases=trim((q('#rel-init-aliases')||{}).value||'')
    .split(/[,，、]/)
    .map(trim)
    .filter(Boolean);

  var value=Number((q('#rel-init-value')||{}).value||0)||0;
  var depth=Number((q('#rel-init-depth')||{}).value||0)||0;

  var presetObj={};
  qa('.rel-mini-btn.on[data-dim]',q('#rel-app',uiRoot())).forEach(function(btn){
    var dim=btn.getAttribute('data-dim')||'';
    var val=btn.getAttribute('data-val')||'';
    if(dim&&val)presetObj[dim]=val;
  });

  var result=core().initChar
    ? core().initChar(s,id,name,{
        role:'secondary',
        aliases:aliases,
        preset:presetObj,
        value:value,
        depth:depth
      })
    : {ok:false,reason:'核心未加载'};

  if(result&&result.ok){
    try{
      if(core().ensureWBEntries)await core().ensureWBEntries(loadState());
    }catch(_){}

    s=loadState();
    s.ui.archiveTab='status';
    s.ui.page='archive';
    s.ui.pageState={charId:id};
    saveState(s);
    syncPromptVarsSafe(s);
    toast('已追加角色「'+name+'」');
    renderAll(true);
  }else{
    toast(result&&result.reason||'追加失败');
  }
}


function removeCharAction(s,cid){
  if(!cid)return;
  if(!confirm('确认移除该角色的所有追踪数据？此操作不可恢复。'))return;
  if(core().removeChar)core().removeChar(s,cid);
  s=loadState();s.ui.focusCharId=firstCharId(s);s.ui.pageState={charId:s.ui.focusCharId};saveState(s);
  syncPromptVarsSafe(s);
  toast('角色已移除');renderAll(true);
}

function correctionAction(cid){
  if(!cid){toast('先选择角色');return}
  var s=loadState();
  var floorL=s.ui.pageState&&s.ui.pageState.floorL||'';
  var tagChanges={};
  qa('.corr-tag-val[data-tag]').forEach(function(sl){var tn=sl.getAttribute('data-tag');if(tn)tagChanges[tn]=Number(sl.value)||0});
  var eventBlockChanges={};
  qa('.rel-event-block').forEach(function(cb){
    var ev=cb.getAttribute('data-ev-type');
    if(ev)eventBlockChanges[ev]=cb.checked?'block':'';
  });
  var corr={type:'manual',valueSet:Number((q('#rel-corr-value')||{}).value||0)||0,depthSet:Number((q('#rel-corr-depth')||{}).value||0)||0,reason:trim((q('#rel-corr-reason')||{}).value||''),tagChanges:tagChanges,floorL:floorL};
  if(core().applyCorrection&&core().applyCorrection(cid,corr)){
    var hasEvBlock=false;
    Object.keys(eventBlockChanges).forEach(function(k){if(eventBlockChanges[k])hasEvBlock=true});
    if(hasEvBlock){
      if(!s.autoCalibration)s.autoCalibration={deltaAdjustment:{},tagBlock:{},eventBlock:{}};
      if(!s.autoCalibration.eventBlock)s.autoCalibration.eventBlock={};
      Object.keys(eventBlockChanges).forEach(function(k){
        if(eventBlockChanges[k]==='block')s.autoCalibration.eventBlock[k]='block';
        else delete s.autoCalibration.eventBlock[k];
      });
      saveState(s);
    }
    toast('修正已提交');renderAll(true);
  }
  else toast('修正失败');
}

async function saveRulesAction(){
  var txt=trim((q('#rel-custom-rules')||{}).value||'');
  if(core().upsertWBEntry){
    await core().upsertWBEntry('rel_custom',txt||'（在这里用自然语言写下你对关系系统的自定义规则，AI 会参考但脚本不会硬解析。）',{constant:true,order:150,enabled:true,name:'关系自定义规则'});
    syncPromptVarsSafe(loadState());
    toast('准则已保存');
  }
  else toast('世界书接口不可用');
}

function toggleSettingAction(s,key){if(!key||!s.settings)return;s.settings[key]=!s.settings[key];saveState(s);syncPromptVarsSafe(s);renderAll(true)}
function saveSystemSettingsAction(s){
  var v=Number((q('#rel-max-tracked')||{}).value||10)||10;
  s.settings.maxTracked=Math.max(1,Math.min(5,Math.round(v)));
  function num(id,key,lo,hi,fb){
    var el=q('#'+id);if(!el)return;
    var n=Number(el.value);if(!isFinite(n))n=fb;
    s.settings[key]=Math.max(lo,Math.min(hi,Math.round(n)));
  }
  num('rel-imp-cooldown','impressionCooldown',0,9,2);
  num('rel-pending-decay','pendingDecayRounds',1,9,3);
  num('rel-mood-life','moodMaxLife',1,9,3);
  num('rel-streak-thresh','streakWarnThreshold',1,9,2);
saveState(s);syncPromptVarsSafe(s);toast('设置已保存');renderAll(true)}

function exportDataAction(s){
  var data=core().exportAll?core().exportAll(s):s;
  var text=JSON.stringify(data,null,2);
  try{if(T.tavo&&T.tavo.utils&&T.tavo.utils.export){T.tavo.utils.export('第五季果汁-关系数据.json',text);toast('数据已导出');return}}catch(_){}
  try{var blob=new Blob([text],{type:'application/json'});var url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);var a=D.createElement('a');a.href=url;a.download='relation_export_'+Date.now()+'.json';D.body.appendChild(a);a.click();D.body.removeChild(a);URL.revokeObjectURL(url);toast('数据已导出')}catch(_e){toast('导出失败')}
}

function exportLogsAction(s){
  var out={exportedAt:now(),chatId:s.chatId||'',chatLogs:safeArr(s.logs),characterLogs:{}};
  trackedIds(s).forEach(function(cid){
    var cs=getCS(cid)||{};
    out.characterLogs[cid]={charName:cs.charName||cid,logs:safeArr(cs.logs),corrections:safeArr(cs.corrections)};
  });
  var text=JSON.stringify(out,null,2);
  try{if(T.tavo&&T.tavo.utils&&T.tavo.utils.export){T.tavo.utils.export('第五季果汁-关系日志.json',text);toast('日志已导出');return}}catch(_){}
  try{var blob=new Blob([text],{type:'application/json'});var url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);var a=D.createElement('a');a.href=url;a.download='relation_logs_'+Date.now()+'.json';D.body.appendChild(a);a.click();D.body.removeChild(a);URL.revokeObjectURL(url);toast('日志已导出')}catch(_e){toast('日志导出失败')}
}

async function wbInitAction(s){var created=[];try{created=core().ensureWBEntries?await core().ensureWBEntries(s):[]}catch(e){toast('世界书初始化失败');return}syncPromptVarsSafe(loadState());toast(created.length?'已创建 '+created.length+' 个世界书条目':'世界书条目已完整')}
function clearDataAction(s){if(!confirm('确认清空所有关系系统数据？此操作不可恢复。'))return;if(core().clearAll)core().clearAll(s);toast('数据已清空');homePage(loadState())}

function openProfileEditor(cid){
  if(!cid){toast('先选择角色');return}
  var pf=getPF(cid)||{},dims=core().PROFILE_DIMS||[],labels=core().PROFILE_DIM_LABEL||{},rules=core().PROFILE_RULES||{};
  var body=dims.map(function(dim){
    var vals=Object.keys(rules[dim]||{普通:1});
    return"<div class='rel-field'><div class='rel-field-label'>"+esc(labels[dim]||dim)+"</div><div class='rel-actions' style='margin-top:0'>"+vals.map(function(v){return"<button class='rel-mini-btn "+(pf[dim]===v?'on':'')+"' data-act='pick-dim' data-dim='"+esc(dim)+"' data-val='"+esc(v)+"'>"+esc(v)+"</button>"}).join('')+"</div></div>";
  }).join('')+"<div class='rel-field'><div class='rel-field-label'>摘要</div><textarea class='rel-textarea' id='rel-profile-summary'>"+esc(pf.summary||'')+"</textarea></div><div class='rel-actions'><button class='rel-btn primary full' data-act='save-profile' data-cid='"+esc(cid)+"'>保存画像</button></div>";
  if(base().openOverlay)base().openOverlay('编辑画像',displayNameOf(loadState(),cid,''),body);
}

async function saveProfileAction(cid){
  var pf=getPF(cid)||{};
  qa('.rel-overlay .rel-mini-btn.on[data-dim]').forEach(function(n){pf[n.getAttribute('data-dim')]=n.getAttribute('data-val')});
  pf.summary=trim((q('#rel-profile-summary')||{}).value||'');
  pf.source='manual';pf.generatedAt=now();
  if(core().savePF)core().savePF(cid,pf);
  try{if(core().syncProfileWB){var cs=getCS(cid)||{};await core().syncProfileWB(cid,cs.charName||cid,pf.summary||'')}}catch(_){}
  syncPromptVarsSafe(loadState());
  if(base().closeOverlay)base().closeOverlay();
  toast('画像已保存');renderAll(true);
}

async function genProfileAction(cid){
  if(!cid){toast('先选择角色');return}
  if(!core().listProfileSources){toast('画像接口不可用');return}
  toast('正在扫描可用来源…');
  var data;try{data=await core().listProfileSources(cid)}catch(_){data={charCard:[],worldBook:[]}}
  var charItems=safeArr(data.charCard);
  var wbItems=safeArr(data.worldBook);
  var pf=getPF(cid)||{};
  var sc=pf.sourceConfig||{};
  var books={};
  wbItems.forEach(function(w){
    if(!books[w.bookId])books[w.bookId]={name:w.bookName,entries:[]};
    books[w.bookId].entries.push(w);
  });
  var html="<div class='rel-card'><div class='rel-card-title'>选择画像来源</div><div class='rel-card-text'>先选角色设定，再选世界书，再选条目。默认都不选，勾哪个就只处理哪个。</div>";
  html+="<div style='margin-top:12px'><label><input type='checkbox' id='rel-src-charcard'"+(sc.useCharacterCard?" checked":"")+"> 使用角色设定</label></div>";
  html+="<div style='margin-top:8px'><label><input type='checkbox' id='rel-src-wb'"+(sc.useWorldbookEntries?" checked":"")+"> 使用世界书条目</label></div>";
  if(Object.keys(books).length){
    var selBooks=safeArr(sc.selectedBookIds);
    var selEntries=safeArr(sc.selectedEntryKeys);
    html+="<div id='rel-src-wb-list' style='margin:8px 0 0 20px'>";
    Object.keys(books).forEach(function(bid){
      var bk=books[bid];
      var bChecked=selBooks.indexOf(String(bid))>=0;
      html+="<details style='margin-top:8px'><summary style='cursor:pointer'>"+esc(bk.name)+"</summary>";
      html+="<div style='margin-top:6px'><label><input type='checkbox' class='rel-src-book' data-book-id='"+esc(bid)+"'"+(bChecked?" checked":"")+"> 选中这本世界书</label></div>";
      bk.entries.forEach(function(e){
        var eKey=bid+'::'+e.entryName;
        var eChecked=selEntries.indexOf(eKey)>=0;
        html+="<div style='margin-left:20px'><label><input type='checkbox' class='rel-src-entry' data-entry-key='"+esc(eKey)+"'"+(eChecked?" checked":"")+"> "+esc(e.entryName)+"</label></div>";
      });
      html+="</details>";
    });
    html+="</div>";
  }
  html+="<div class='rel-actions' style='margin-top:16px'><button class='rel-btn primary full' data-act='run-profile-gen' data-cid='"+esc(cid)+"'>确认生成</button></div></div>";
  app._profileSourceData={cid:cid,charCard:charItems,worldBook:wbItems};
  if(base().openOverlay)base().openOverlay('画像来源选择',displayNameOf(loadState(),cid,''),html);
}

async function confirmGenProfileAction(){
  var data=app._profileSourceData;
  if(!data||!data.cid){toast('来源数据丢失');return}
  var ov=q('.rel-overlay')||document;
  var sourceConfig={
    useCharacterCard:!!(q('#rel-src-charcard',ov)||{}).checked,
    useWorldbookEntries:!!(q('#rel-src-wb',ov)||{}).checked,
    selectedBookIds:[],
    selectedEntryKeys:[]
  };
  qa('.rel-src-book:checked',ov).forEach(function(cb){sourceConfig.selectedBookIds.push(cb.getAttribute('data-book-id'))});
  qa('.rel-src-entry:checked',ov).forEach(function(cb){sourceConfig.selectedEntryKeys.push(cb.getAttribute('data-entry-key'))});
  if(base().closeOverlay)base().closeOverlay();
  toast('正在生成画像摘要…');
  var ok=false;
var err='';
try{
  ok=await core().updateProfileSync(data.cid,sourceConfig);
}catch(e){
  err=String(e&&e.message||e||'');
}
app._profileSourceData=null;
toast(ok?'画像已更新':('画像生成失败'+(err?'：'+err:'')));
renderAll(true);

}

function mount(){
  ensurePageStyle();
  if(base().ensureRoot)base().ensureRoot();
  bind();
  app.ui=app.ui||{};
  app.ui.bind=bind;
  app.ui.renderAll=renderAll;
  app.ui.bindTextEditors=bindTextEditors;
  app.ui.nav=nav;
  app.ui.goPage=goPage;
  app.ui.backPage=backPage;
  app.ui.fetchCurrentCharIntoDraft=fetchCurrentCharIntoDraft;
  app.ui.readInitDraftFromState=readInitDraftFromState;
  app.ui.clearInitDraft=clearInitDraft;
  app.ui.ensureEntryPage=ensureEntryPage;
  app.ui.clearActionLock=function(){endAction()};
  app.ui.debugState=function(){return{actBusy:!!_actBusy,actBusyAt:Number(_actBusyAt||0)||0,actBusyAction:String(_actBusyAction||'')}};
  if(base().open)app.ui.open=base().open;
  if(base().close)app.ui.close=base().close;
  if(base().toast)app.ui.toast=base().toast;
  ensureEntryPage();
}

mount();

}catch(e){
  console.error('[关系系统 界面]',e);
}
})();

</script>
